2.5: ali t…Ēt…Ēk pa dal…õ pin p…õnayi f…õ ant…Ēf k…ôroŇč, ali ayika Ňča dal…õ Ňčin Ňč…õnapoŇč f…õ t…õm tat…Ēk…Ē. Bawo MARIKI Kanu …õnator…õ f…õ w…ôcaf…ôn d…ônt…Ēf, fum …õnayi f…õ s…Ē, nw…õ …õmb…ôc ant…Ēf m…Ē.

3.1: Abok Ňč…õnac…ôr…õ mes Ňč…õtas s…õm ya dal…õ f…ôp ny…õ MARIKI Kanu …õnawur…õ m…Ē. K'abok Ňčeyif w…ôran: ¬ęKanu k…ôloku nu ti yati a ta n…ôdi yokom ya t…Ēk ya dal…õ dand…õ ba?¬Ľ

3.13: K…Ē MARIKI Kanu eyif w…ôran: ¬ęTa ake t…Ē m…ôy…Ēn…õ tant…õ-…õ?¬Ľ K…Ē w…ôran oloku Kanu: ¬ęAbok ŇčetiŇčk…ôr im, k'indi pokom pamp…õ.¬Ľ
3.14: K…Ē MARIKI Kanu oloku abok: ¬ęBawo m…ôs…ĒŇč…õ w…ôran k…ôciya, k…ôs…ĒŇč …ôm k…ônder p…ôl…õc s…õm y…Ēc…Ēl, k…Ē s…õm ya dop f…ôp dac…Ē. Kor k…Ē m…ônde m…ôcliŇč…õn…õ, m…ôcdi k…ôbof mataka ma kiyi kam doru f…ôp.

8.16: ¬ęM…ôwur abil disr…õ, m…ôna k…Ē w…ôran kam, awut am k'aran aŇčan.

Kance k…Ē, bawo afum m…õc…õm-c…õmn…õ m…õl…õc meyi Ňča d…ôb…ôk…ôc k…ôy…õf…õ dowut daŇčan, mba if…Ēs…Ēl…ôs…ôr ca ny…õ yeŇčes…ôm doru p…ôm…Ē nt…õ int…õp ti k…ôcy…Ē m…Ē.¬Ľ

9.17: K…Ē Kanu k…ôŇčgb…Ēk…ôr…õn…õ s…Ē moloku mam…õ Nuha: ¬ęAsiŇčki Ňčement…ôr temer nt…õ is…ĒŇč nu k…Ē ca ya doru ny…õ yeŇčes…ôm m…Ē.¬Ľ Nuha k'awut …Ēn maas: Doru dofu, k…Ē kiciya k…ôfu s…Ē
9.18: Awut a Nuha aŇč…õ Ňčanawur debil m…Ē Ňčanay…Ēn…õ: Sem, Ham, k…Ē Yaf…õt. Ham …Ēy…Ēn…õ papa w…ôka KanaŇč.

24.60: K…Ē Ňčantolan…õ Rebeka k…Ē Ňčaloku k…Ē: ¬ęM…ôna w…ôkir…õ kosu, m…ôy…Ēn…õ w…ôka afum alar…ôm! M…ôy…Ēn…õ fum nw…õ yuruya y…Ēn yendetam ater…õn…õ aŇčan m…Ē!¬Ľ

24.62: T…õt…ôŇčn…õ Siyaka p…ôlukus k…ôy…õf…õ ka k…ôl…ômp ka Lahay-Roy, p…ônd…õ nde at…Ēf Ňča N…õk…õf.
24.63: D…Ēf…Ēy d…Ēl…Ēma k…Ē Siyaka …ĒŇčk…Ē d…ôŇčk…Ēt…ôs d…ôkulum, endeyekti f…Ēr k'…õn…ôŇčk y…Ēk…Ēm…õ yecder.

24.66: K…Ē w…ôcar ka Abraham …Ēl…Ēm…ôr Siyaka mes m…Ēk…Ē …õnacep…ôr…õn…õ m…Ē f…ôp.

25.1: K…Ē Abraham …õl…õk s…Ē w…ôran w…ôl…Ēma, pacwe k…Ē Ketura.

25.4: Awut a MadiyaŇč Ňčanay…Ēn…õ Hefah, Hefer, Henok, Abidah, k…Ē ∆źldaha. AkaŇč…õ Ňčanay…Ēn…õ awut a Ketura.
25.6: Awut a alak'…Ēn, k'ompoc…õ Ňča, p…ôs…Ēr…Ēyi doru, k'eŇčkek…ôr…õ Ňča poŇč p…ôb…Ēl…õn…õ Ňča wan k…Ēn Siyaka, at…Ēf nŇč…õ Ňčeyi ntende k…ôca nk…õ dec d…õmp…õ m…Ē.
25.7: K…ôwon ka Abraham doru k…ônas…Ēt…Ē meren tasar tin w…ôco cam…ôt m…õr…ôŇč k…Ē k…ôcam…ôt (175).
25.8: K…Ē Abraham ontor…õ kifir, k'efi nt…õ encep…ôr…õn…õ detem dobotu m…Ē, p…ôb…õk, p…ôn…õmb…ôr…õ mataka ma doru, k'…Ēn…ĒŇčk…ôl atem …Ēn aŇč…õ Ňčanafi m…Ē.
25.9: Siyaka k…Ē S…ômayila awut a Abraham, Ňčawup k…Ē nde d…ôk…ôwup…õn…õ da Makpela, nde dal…õ da H…õf…ôroŇč wan ka Cohar w…ôHewy, p…ôt…õf…ôr…õn…õ di k…Ē Mamre.

25.11: Nt…õ defi da Abraham dencep…ôr m…Ē, k…Ē Kanu k…ômpoc…õ wan k…Ēn Siyaka nw…õ …õnand…õ nde k…ôl…ômp ka Lahay-Roy k…ôs…ôk m…Ē.
25.12: Awut a S…ômayila Ňč…Ē akaŇč…õ, S…ômayila wan k'Abraham, nw…õ wan w…ôran w…ôMisira Hakar w…ôcar ka Sara …õnakom…õ Abraham m…Ē.
25.13: Mewe ma awut a S…ômayila m…õm…õ, t…Ēk…Ē Ňčanab…õk…õn…õ m…Ē: Nebay…Ēt coco ca S…ômayila, Kedar, Adebel, Mib…ôsam,
25.15: Hadad, Tema, Yetur, Nafis, k…Ē Kedema. Awut a S…ômayila Ňč…Ē akak…Ē.
25.16: Mewe maŇčan m…Ē mam…Ēk…Ē t…õnd…õ taŇčan c…ôgbo c…ôgbo. Ab…õ w…ôco k…Ē m…õr…ôŇč Ňčanayi Ňča kiriŇč d…õlay daŇčan.
25.17: K…ôyi ka S…ômayila doru k…ônawon meren tasar tin w…ôco maas k…Ē cam…ôt m…õr…ôŇč (137). K'ontor…õ kifir, k'…Ēn…ĒŇčk…ôl atem …Ēn ak…Ē Ňčanafi m…Ē.
25.18: Afum a S…ômayila Ňčayi k…ôy…õf…õ ka Hawila haŇč Sur ns…õ s…ônt…õf…ôrn…õ Misira m…Ē, k…ôk…Ē ka k…ôca ka Asiri. Yuruya ya S…ômayila Ňčanand…õ Ňčat…õf…ôrn…õ aw…õnc aŇča f…ôp. Tecep…ôr…õn…õ ta Yakuba 25-36 Esayu k…Ē Yakuba
25.19: Afum a Siyaka Ňč'aŇč…õ, wan ka Abraham. Abraham okom Siyaka.
25.20: Siyaka …õnas…Ēt…Ē meren w…ôco maŇčk…ôl…õ (40) a k'enden…õnc…õ Rebeka, wan w…ôran w…ôka Betuh…õl w…ôka Aram w…ôka PadaŇč-Aram, w…ôkir…õ ka LabaŇč w…ôka Aram.
25.21: K…Ē Siyaka ontola MARIKI teta w…ôran k…Ēn, bawo …õnakom f…õ wan. K…Ē MARIKI ene k…ôtola k…Ēn. K…Ē w…ôran k…Ēn Rebeka …õmb…õk…ôs.
25.22: K…Ē awut Ňčay…õf…ôr…õn…õ k…Ē kor disr…õ, k…Ē Rebeka eyifn…õ: ¬ęAk'ender im tant…õ-…õ?¬Ľ K'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôkorn…õ MARIKI.
25.23: K…Ē MARIKI oloku k…Ē: ¬ęAfum a t…Ēf m…õr…ôŇč Ňčay'…ôm d…ôkor, afum m…õr…ôŇč akak…Ē Ňčandegb…õy…õn…õ k…ôwur …ôm d…ôkor. Afum a w…ôkin nw…õ Ňčandetas…ôrn…õ aka w…ôka m…õr…ôŇč. W…ôbeki endeyi w…ôf…õt tant…Ēf.¬Ľ
25.24: D…ôŇčkom d…Ēn k'an…ôŇčk a c…ôberi c…ôyi k…Ē d…ôkor.
25.25: D…ôŇčkom daŇčan, k…Ē w…ôc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē ender p…ôla c…ôfon c…ôyim d…ôris p…ôm…Ē w…õs…õm, k'awe k…Ē Esayu.
25.26: K…Ē tencep…ôr, k…Ē w…ôka m…õr…ôŇč ender p…ôsump…ôr atek Ňča w…ôc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē. K'awe w…ôkak…Ē Yakuba. Siyaka p…ôs…Ēt…Ē t…õm tat…Ēk…Ē oŇč meren w…ôco cam…ôt tin (60) a k'andekom…õ k…Ē awut akaŇč…õ.
25.27: K…Ē awut arkun aŇč…õ Ňčamb…õk. K…Ē Esayu ende p…ôy…Ēn…õ w…ôp…õn w…ôt…Ēt, w…ôb…Ēt…ôr k…ôy…õks…õ-y…õks…õ d…ôkulum k…ôt…õn ka s…õm y…õp…õn, k…Ē Yakuba nk…Ēn …Ēy…Ēn…õ w…ôyi w…ôka dare, w…ôt…Ēsims…õ dis p…ôb…Ēt…ôr k…ônd…õ d'abal.
25.28: Siyaka …õnab…Ēt…ôr Esayu bawo …õnab…Ēt…ôr s…õm ny…õ Esayu …õncp…õn m…Ē. Rebeka nk…Ēn p…ôb…Ēt…ôr Yakuba.
25.29: D…Ēs…Ēk d…Ēl…Ēma k…Ē Yakuba oncoŇč…ôr m…õnc, k…Ē Esayu ender p…ôy…õf…õ d…ôkulum dis d…Ēl…Ēl k…Ē.
25.30: K…Ē Esayu oloku Yakuba: ¬ęM…ôpoc'em, il…õts…õn'am idi p…ôyim pam pap…Ēk…Ē bawo dis d…Ēl…Ēl im.¬Ľ Ti t…Ē as…ĒŇč…õ Esayu tewe ta ¬ęEd…Ēm ¬Ľ.
25.31: K…Ē Yakuba oloku Esayu: ¬ęM…ôway…ôr im m…Ēk…Ē d…ôk…ôc…ôm…õ da debeki dam.¬Ľ
25.32: K…Ē Esayu oloku k…Ē: ¬ęIn'…õw…õ icfi, ake d…ôk…ôc…ôm…õ da debeki dad…Ēk…Ē dendey…Ē em-…õ?¬Ľ
25.33: K…Ē Yakuba oloku: ¬ęM…ôd…õr…ôm'em k…ôr…õsna.¬Ľ K…Ē Esayu …õnd…õrm…õ Yakuba k'…õway…ôr k…Ē d…ôk…ôc…ôm…õ da debeki d…Ēn.
25.34: K…Ē Yakuba ompoc…õ Esayu k…ôcom, k…Ē m…õnc mam…Ēk…Ē. K…Ē Esayu endi yeri yay…Ēk…Ē, k'omun, k'…õy…õf…õ k'…ĒŇčk…Ē. Tat…Ēk…Ē t…Ē Esayu …õnagbal d…ôk…ôc…ôm…õ da debeki d…Ēn.

26.1: K…Ē dor dende deyi d…Ēt…Ēf, nd…õ d…õnaciyan…õ k…Ē dor d…Ēc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē d…Ēk…Ē d…õnayi di t…õm ta Abraham m…Ē. K…Ē Siyaka …ĒŇčk…Ē nda Abim…õl…õk, w…ôb…õ ka aFilisti nde Kerar.
26.2: K…Ē MARIKI owur…ôr Siyaka, k'oloku k…Ē: ¬ęTa m…ôtor Misira, m…ôyi at…Ēf nŇč…õ indebonc…ôr …ôm m…Ē.
26.3: M…ônd…õ at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ. Isol'am, indepoc'am p…ôt…Ēt, bawo m…ôna k…Ē yuruya yam Ňč'indes…ĒŇč ant…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ f…ôp. Indelas t…õm tat…Ēk…Ē k…ôd…õr…ôm nk…õ inad…õrm…õ papa kam Abraham m…Ē.
26.4: Indey…Ē yuruya yam y…õla p…ôm…Ē c…Ēs ca darenc. Indes…ĒŇč yuruya yam t…Ēf yay…õ f…ôp. Afum a doru f…ôp Ňčande Ňčact…õn k…ôtola nn…Ē yuruya yam yeyi m…Ē.
26.5: Abraham …õnac…ôŇčk…ôl dim dem, p…ôc…ôm…õ d…Ēp…Ē dem dar…ôŇč, p…ôsump…ôr moloku mem, p…ôlel…ôs m…õfaŇč mem k…Ē sariy…õ sem.¬Ľ
26.7: Nt…õ afum a tofo tat…Ēk…Ē Ňčancyif…ôt teta w…ôran k…Ēn m…Ē, p…ôcloku Ňča: ¬ęW…ôkir…õ kem …Ēf…Ē.¬Ľ P…ôcnes…õ k…ôloku a w…ôran k…Ēn …Ēf…Ē, ta afum a tofo tat…Ēk…Ē Ňčadif k…Ē, bawo Rebeka …õnates…õ.
26.8: Nt…õ k…ôyi k…Ēn k…ôncwon di m…Ē, k…Ē tosur…õn…õ Abim…õl…õk w…ôb…õ ka aFilisti p…ôwur…õ k…ôro d…ôwund…õr p…ôcm…Ēm…ôn, k'…õn…ôŇčk Siyaka p…ôcc…õc…õn…õ k…Ē w…ôran k…Ēn Rebeka.
26.9: K…Ē Abim…õl…õk ewe Siyaka k'eyif k…Ē: ¬ęW…ôran kam …Ēy…Ēn…õ w…ôran nw…õ ba! Ake's…ĒŇč…õ nt…õ m…ôloku su a w…ôkir…õ kam …Ēf…Ē m…Ē?¬Ľ K…Ē Siyaka oloku k…Ē: ¬ęIloku ti k…ônes…õ disr…õ ta idefin…õ tet…Ēn.¬Ľ
26.10: K…Ē Abim…õl…õk oloku k…Ē: ¬ęC…ôke m…ôy…Ē su tant…õ? P…ôpic p…õc…ôm…õ w…ôl…Ēma su dac…Ē Ňčaf…ônt…ôr…õ k…Ē w…ôran kam, k…Ē m…ôn'…Ēs…ĒŇč…õ su k…ôsar…õ kiciya.¬Ľ
26.11: K…Ē Abim…õl…õk …Ēs…ĒŇč dim dad…Ēk…Ē afum …Ēn f…ôp, nt…õ: ¬ęFum nw…õ o nw…õ oŇčgbuŇč…õn…õ w…ôrkun nw…õ k…Ē w…ôran k…Ēn m…Ē, m…õn…õ padif w…ôkayi.¬Ľ
26.12: K…Ē Siyaka …Ēmb…Ēf k…ôren kaŇčk…Ē d…Ēt…Ēf k'…õnt…õl tasar tin (100) ta t…Ēk…Ē …õnab…Ēf m…Ē, bawo MARIKI …õnapoc…õ k…Ē p…ôt…Ēt.
26.13: K…Ē w…ôrkun nw…õ …Ēs…Ēt…Ē daka, k'…õmb…õr…õn…õ k…ôs…Ēt…Ē daka haŇč k'…õnaŇčkan…õ k…ôy…Ēn…õ w…ôka daka w…ôp…ĒŇč.
26.14: Siyaka …õnay…Ē y…Ēc…Ēl y…õlar…ôm: C…ôna, cir, Ňčkesiya, k…Ē acar alar…ôm, t…Ēs…ĒŇč…õ aFilisti Ňčay…Ēn…õ k…Ē k…ôraca. Siyaka k…ôsek k…Ēn danapa k…Ē Abim…õl…õk
26.15: C…ôl…ômp nc…õ acar a kas Abraham Ňčanakay kiyi k…Ēn doru m…Ē, k…Ē aFilisti Ňčam…ônt…ôn ci, k…Ē Ňčalas ci k…ôbof.
26.16: K…Ē Abim…õl…õk oloku Siyaka: ¬ęM…ôy…õf…õ ndorosu m…ôk…Ē bawo m…ômb…õk su f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr.¬Ľ
26.17: K…Ē Siyaka …õy…õf…õ di, k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôc…ômb…ôr saŇčka nde d…ôŇčgb…ôl da Kerar k…ôs…ôk.
26.18: K…Ē Siyaka …ĒŇčgb…Ēk…ôr…õ s…Ē k…ôkay c…ôl…ômp nc…õ anakay t…õm ta kas Abraham, a k…Ē aFilisti Ňčam…ônt…ôn ci k…ôcep…ôr ka defi da Abraham m…Ē. K'ewe s…Ē ci mewe m…Ēk…Ē kas …õnawe ci m…Ē.
26.19: K…Ē acar a Siyaka ŇčaŇčkay s…Ē k…ôl…ômp k…ôl…Ēma, d…ôndo m…Ēr…Ē dac…Ē, k…Ē Ňčamb…ôp ki disr…õ domun d…Ēt…Ēt.
26.20: Ak…õk a y…Ēc…Ēl ya dare da Kerar ŇčancaŇč ak…õk a y…Ēc…Ēl ya Siyaka k…ôc…Ēp, Ňčacsims…õ k…ôl…ômp, k…Ē Ňčaloku: ¬ęK…ôl…ômp kaŇčk…õ kosu k…Ē.¬Ľ K…Ē Siyaka ewe k…ôl…ômp kaŇčk…Ē Es…õk, bawo afum Ňčanagb…õk…ôl…õn…õ ta ki k…Ē nk…Ēn.
26.21: K…Ē acar a Siyaka Ňčaluks…ôrn…õ s…Ē k…ôkay k…ôl…ômp k…ôl…Ēma nk…õ anagb…õk…ôl…õn…õ s…Ē taka ki m…Ē, k'ewe ki Sitna.
26.22: K'eliŇč saŇčka s…Ēn d…ôndo, k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôkay s…Ē k…ôl…ômp k…ôl…Ēma nk…õ anat…Ēgb…õk…ôl…õn…õ ta ki m…Ē, k'ewe ki Rehobot, bawo, oncloku: MARIKI p…ôyac su, p…ôsik…ôli su, k…ôdes…Ēt…Ē f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ.
26.24: K…Ē MARIKI owur…ôr k…Ē pibi pap…Ēk…Ē, k'oloku k…Ē: ¬ęIn'…Ēy…Ēn…õ Kanu ka papa kam Abraham. Ta m…ônes…õ, bawo isol'am, indepoc'am p…ôt…Ēt, indey…Ē s…Ē yuruya yam Ňčala, teta w…ôcar kem Abraham.¬Ľ
26.25: K…Ē Siyaka …õnc…ômb…ôr di tetek toloŇčn…õ k'okorn…õ tewe ta MARIKI. K'…õnc…ômb…ôr s…Ē di abal, k…Ē acar …Ēn ŇčaŇčkay s…Ē di k…ôl…ômp.
26.26: K…Ē Abim…õl…õk …õy…õf…õ Kerar k…ôk…Ēn…ôŇčk nk…Ēn Siyaka Ňčasol k…Ē Ahusat wanapa k…Ēn, k…Ē Pik…Ēl w…ôb…õ w…ôka as…Ēdar …Ēn.
26.27: K…Ē Siyaka eyif Ňča: ¬ęTa ake t…Ē n…ônder…õn…õ nn…Ē nderem-…õ, bawo n…ônter im, k…Ē n…ômb…õl…ôs im nde ndoronu?¬Ľ
26.28: K…Ē Ňčaloku k…Ē: ¬ęS…ôn…ôŇčk belbel a MARIKI osol'am. Ti t…Ē s…ôlok…õ: A pad…õrm…õn…õ, ti t…Ē tat…Ēk…Ē m…ôna k…Ē s…ôna, pat…ôŇčn…õ pasek danapa.
26.29: Nt…õ tendes…ĒŇč…õ ta m…ôy…Ē su ali p…ôl…õc pin, p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē s…ônat…Ēy…Ē …ôm p…ôl…õc, k…Ē s…ôy…Ē …ôm p…ôt…Ēt haŇč k…Ē s…ôsak …ôm k…Ē m…ôŇčk…Ē p…ôforu disr…õ m…Ē. Nd…õk…ôl oŇč MARIKI ompoc'am.¬Ľ
26.30: K…Ē Siyaka omboc…õ Ňča k…ôsata, k…Ē Ňčandi yeri k…Ē Ňčamun.
26.31: K…Ē Ňčay…õf…õ b…ôtb…ôt suy k…Ē Ňčand…õrm…õn…õ. K…Ē Siyaka …õsak Ňča k…Ē Ňčalukus k…Ē Ňčasak Siyaka p…ôforu disr…õ.
26.32: D…Ēs…Ēk din dad…Ēk…Ē d…Ē acar a Siyaka Ňčander Ňčaloku k…Ē teta k…ôl…ômp k…ôŇčk…Ē Ňčanakay m…Ē, k…Ē Ňčaloku k…Ē: ¬ęS…ôs…Ēt…Ē domun.¬Ľ
26.33: K…Ē Siyaka ewe k…ôl…ômp kaŇčk…Ē Sibeya. Ti t…Ēs…ĒŇč…õ nt…õ aŇčwen…õ dare dad…Ēk…Ē Bersaba haŇč m…Ēk…Ē m…Ē. Esayu k…ôn…õnc…õ k…Ēn
26.34: Esayu k…ôs…Ēt…Ē k…Ēn meren w…ôco maŇčk…ôl…õ (40), k'…õl…õk aran aHewy, pacwe Ňča Sudit wan ka Beri k…Ē Basmat wan ka El…Ēn.
26.35: K'aran aHitara akaŇč…õ m…õr…ôŇč Ňčawon…ôs Siyaka k…Ē Rebeka dis.

27.1: Siyaka …Ēncy…Ēn…õ w…ôtem, f…Ēr y…Ēcl…Ēl k…Ē haŇč k…Ē t…õl…ôps…ôr k…Ē k…ôt…Ēn…ôŇčk. K'ewe wan k…Ēn w…ôc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē Esayu, k'oloku k…Ē: ¬ęWan kem!¬Ľ K…Ē Esayu owos…õ: ¬ęIn'…õw…õ!¬Ľ
27.2: K…Ē Siyaka …ĒŇčgb…Ēk…ôr…õ: ¬ęIy…Ēn…õ w…ôtem, inc…ôr…õ f…õ d…Ēs…Ēk dem defi.
27.3: M…ôl…õk oŇč y…õp…õn…õ yam, c…ôb…ôlma cam k…Ē amb…ônc…ôran, m…ôk…Ē d…ôkulum m…ôk…Ē m…ôp…õn'em w…õs…õm.
27.4: M…ôlomp…ôs'em peri p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē imb…Ēt…ôr ti m…Ē. M…ôk…õr'em pi, idi, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ ina yati itolan'am p…ôt…Ēt a icfi m…Ē.¬Ľ
27.5: Rebeka p…ôcc…ôŇčk…ôl t…Ēk…Ē Siyaka oncloku wan k…Ēn Esayu m…Ē. K…Ē Esayu …ĒŇčk…Ē d…ôkulum k…ôk…Ēp…õn w…õs…õm, p…ôk…õr…õ.
27.6: K…Ē Rebeka oloku wan k…Ēn Yakuba: ¬ęNt…õ t'ine. Papa kam p…ôcloku w…õnc …ôm Esayu:
27.7: ‚ÄĻM…ôk…õr'em w…õs…õm. M…ôlomp…ôs'em peri mp…õ indedi, itolan'am p…ôt…Ēt nde MARIKI eyi m…Ē, a icfi.‚Äļ

35.18: Nt…õ Ras…õl encfi m…Ē, k'ewe wan w…ôkak…Ē B…õn-Oni . Mba k…Ē kas ewe k…Ē BeŇčyamin .

35.27: K…Ē Yakuba ender kas Siyaka k…ôs…ôk, nde Mamre, nde Kiriyat Arba, nde p…ôy…Ēn…õ Heb…ôr…ĒŇč m…Ē, a k…Ē Abraham k…Ē Siyaka Ňčanayi decik…ôra m…Ē.

36.6: K…Ē Esayu …õl…õk aran …Ēn, awut …Ēn arkun k…Ē aran, afum …Ēn aka k…ôl…Ē k…Ēn, y…Ēc…Ēl y…Ēn k…Ē ca y…Ēk…Ē …õnas…Ēt…Ē at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč m…Ē f…ôp, k'…ĒŇčk…Ē at…Ēf Ňč…Ēl…Ēma. K'…Ēmb…Ēl…õ w…õnc Yakuba,
36.7: bawo y…Ēc…Ēl y…õnalar Ňča, ta Ňčantam k…ôyi tofo tin-…õ. At…Ēf nŇč…õ Ňčanayi m…Ē Ňč…õnaf…õt…ôr Ňča teta y…Ēc…Ēl yaŇčan y…õlar…ôm.

36.18: Awut a Oholibama Ňč…Ē akaŇč…õ, w…ôran ka Esayu: W…ôb…õ Yehus, w…ôb…õ Yahelam, k…Ē w…ôb…õ Korah. Ab…õ a Oholibama Ňč…Ē akaŇč…õ wan w…ôran ka Ana, w…ôran ka Esayu.

36.31: T…õm tat…Ēk…Ē ab…õ Ňčanat…Ēmp…ôr f…õ k…ôr…õsna d…õb…õ nde at…Ēf Ňča Yisrayel. Mewe ma ab…õ aŇč…õ Ňčanacep…ôr at…Ēf Ňča Ed…Ēm m…Ē, m…Ē mam…õ:

37.1: K…Ē Yakuba …õnd…õ at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč nde kas …õnand…õ m…Ē.

P…ôy…Ēn…õ wan w…ôf…õt, p…ôcc…ôm…õ awut arkun a Bilha k…Ē Silpa dar…ôŇč, aran a kas. Mba Isifu encder p…ôcs…ĒŇč…õ papa k…ôŇčan k…ôc…ôr…õ m…õc…õmc…õmn…õ m…õl…õc m…Ēk…Ē menccep…ôr di m…Ē f…ôp.
37.3: Yakuba …õnab…Ēt…ôr Isifu p…ôtas awut …Ēn alp…ôs aŇč…õ f…ôp, bawo detem disr…õ d'…õnas…Ēt…Ē k…Ē. K…Ē Yakuba …Ēs…Ēt burumus b…Ēn…ĒŇčk…ôs…ôl lom k'…Ēs…ĒŇč bi Isifu.
37.4: K…Ē aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčande Ňčan…ôŇčk, a kas k…ôŇčan …Ēmb…Ēt…ôr Isifu p…ôtas Ňča f…ôp. K…Ē Ňčam…õŇčk…õ Isifu m…õt…õl…õ mam…Ēk…Ē. K…Ē Ňčayi ta ŇčaŇčlok-lok…ôr Isifu belbel-…õ.
37.5: K…Ē Isifu …õw…õr…ôp, k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôloku mere mam…Ēk…Ē aw…õnc aŇča, k…Ē akak…Ē ŇčanaŇčkan…õ s…Ē k…ôter k…Ē.
37.6: K…Ē Isifu oloku Ňča: ¬ęAw…õnc im aŇča, n…ôc…ôŇčk…ôl mere mm…õ iw…õr…ôpna m…Ē!
37.7: D…ôkulum ayina pacsek m…õmp…ôl…õ. P…ôwon f…õ k…Ē kilim kem ka m…õmp…ôl…õ k…ôy…õf…õ k…Ē k…ônc…ôm…õ sot! K…Ē cilim ca m…õmp…ôl…õ ma n…ôna c…ônder c…ôn…ĒŇčk…ôr kem, k…Ē c…ôntontn…õn…õ ki.¬Ľ
37.8: K…Ē aw…õnc aŇča Ňčaloku k…Ē: ¬ęMba m…ôna m…ônc…õm-c…õmn…õ k…ôy…Ēn…õ ka w…ôb…õ ka s…ôna ba? M…ôyi su k…ôroŇč?¬Ľ K…Ē Ňčamb…õr…õn…õ s…Ē k…ôter k…Ē teta moloku m…Ēn mam…Ēk…Ē.
37.9: K…Ē Isifu endes…Ē p…ôw…õr…ôp, k'oloku s…Ē ti aw…õnc aŇča. K'oloku: ¬ęIw…õr…ôpna s…Ē: Dec, Ňčof k…Ē c…Ēs w…ôco k…Ē pin yontontn…õn'em.¬Ľ
37.10: K…Ē Isifu oloku mere mam…Ēk…Ē papa k…Ēn k…Ē aw…õnc aŇča. K…Ē papa k…Ēn oŇčkul-kul…ôr k…Ē, k'eyif k…Ē: ¬ęC…ôke c…Ē mere mam…õ m…ôw…õr…ôp m…Ē moloku-…õ? M…ônc…õm-c…õmn…õ a s…ôndeder, iya kam, aw…õnc …ôm aŇča, k…Ē ina s…ôdetontn…õn'am d…ônt…Ēf?¬Ľ
37.11: K…Ē aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčay…Ēn…õ k…Ē k…ôraca. Mba k…Ē kas k…ôŇčan …õm…õŇčk…ôrn…õ k…ôw…õr…ôp kaŇčk…Ē. Aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčancam…ôs k…Ē
37.12: K…Ē aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčande Ňčawur, k…ôk…Ēk…õk Ňčkesiya k…Ē cir ya kas k…ôŇčan nde S…ôk…õm.
37.13: K…Ē Yakuba oloku Isifu: ¬ęAw…õnc …ôm aŇča Ňčayi S…ôk…õm Ňčawur…õn…õ y…Ēc…Ēl k…ôk…Ēs…Ēm…ôt. M…ôder, ifaŇč k…ôsom …ôm nde Ňčayi m…Ē.¬Ľ K…Ē Isifu owos…õ: ¬ęIn'…õw…õ!¬Ľ
37.14: K…Ē Yakuba oloku k…Ē: ¬ęM…ôk…Ē m…ôm…Ēm…ôn em k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ a daka o daka d…Ēy…Ē f…õ aw…õnc …ôm aŇča k…Ē y…Ēc…Ēl y…õf…õt y…õf…õt-…õ. M…ôder m…ôlok'im ti.¬Ľ K'osom k…Ē k…ôy…õf…õ ka aranta Ňča Heb…ôr…ĒŇč, k…Ē Isifu …ĒŇčk…Ē S…ôk…õm.
37.15: K…Ē w…ôrkun w…ôl…Ēma …ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôb…ôp k…Ē p…ôckaf…ôl…õ-kaf…ôl…õ d…ôkulum. K…Ē w…ôrkun nw…õ eyif k…Ē: ¬ęAke m…ônt…õn-…õ?¬Ľ
37.16: K…Ē Isifu oloku k…Ē: ¬ęAw…õnc im aŇča Ňč'int…õn, il…õts…õn'am m…ôment…ôr im nde Ňčayi k…ôk…õk y…Ēc…Ēl m…Ē.¬Ľ
37.17: K…Ē w…ôrkun nw…õ oloku k…Ē: ¬ęŇäay…õf…õ d…õ, inen…õna Ňča Ňčacloku: ‚ÄĻPaŇčk…Ēn k…ôca ka DotaŇč.‚Äļ¬Ľ K…Ē Isifu …õnc…ôm…õ ni yaŇčan dar…ôŇč k…Ē y…Ēc…Ēl haŇč k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôb…ôp Ňča DotaŇč.
37.18: K'aw…õnc aŇča Ňčan…ôŇčk k…Ē p…ôb…Ēl…õ, ta …õntab…ôp Ňča-…õ, k…Ē Ňčasek…õ k…Ē k…ôdif.
37.19: K…Ē Ňčalok…õn…õ: ¬ęW…ôb…õ ka k…ôw…õr…ôp ender w…ôk…Ē.
37.20: N…ôder oŇč padif k…Ē, pagbal k…Ē nde d…ôk…ôl…ômp. Pak…Ē paloku a w…õs…õm w…Ēs…Ēm k…Ē. Pam…Ēm…ôn oŇč daka nd…õ k…ôw…õr…ôp k…Ēn k…ôndey…Ēn…õ m…Ē.¬Ľ
37.21: K…Ē Ruben ene ti, k'…õmbaŇč k…Ē akak…Ē d…ôwaca. K'oloku: ¬ęTa pas…ĒŇč…õ k…Ē k…ôfi.¬Ľ
37.22: K…Ē Ruben oloku s…Ē: ¬ęTa n…ôwur…õ mecir! N…ôgbal k…Ē k…ôl…ômp kaŇčk…õ k…ôyi nn…Ē d…ôt…õgb…ôr…õ m…Ē. Ta n…ôdeŇč…ôr k…Ē k…ôca!¬Ľ ∆źnaloku Ňča moloku mam…õ, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ p…ôtam k…ôyac Isifu defi, p…ôken…õ k…Ē kas m…Ē.
37.23: Nt…õ Isifu …õmb…ôp aw…õnc aŇča m…Ē, k…Ē akak…Ē Ňčawur…õ k…Ē burumus b…Ēn…ĒŇčk…ôs…ôl lom b…Ēk…Ē …õnab…õrn…õ m…Ē.
37.24: K…Ē Ňčasump…ôr k…Ē, k…Ē Ňčantor…õ k…Ē d…ôk…ôl…ômp. K…ôl…ômp kaŇčk…Ē k…ônawos…ôr, ali domun k…ônay…Ē f…õ.
37.25: K…Ē Ňčand…õ Ňčacdi yeri, Ňčandeyekti f…Ēr, k…Ē Ňčan…ôŇčk afum a S…ômayila Ňčay…õf…õ at…Ēf Ňča Kaladu. Y…Ēk…Ēm…õ yaŇčan y…õsar…õ suray, c…Ēl k…Ē labund…õ ny…õ Ňčanckek…ôr…õ Misira m…Ē.
37.26: K…Ē Yuda eyif aw…õnc aŇča: ¬ęTa ake t…Ē andedif…õ w…õnc kosu pam…õŇčk mecir m…Ēn-…õ?
37.27: N…ôder pacams…ôr k…Ē afum a S…ômayila. Ta padeŇč…ôr k…Ē k…ôca. Bawo w…õnc kosu …Ēf…Ē, mecir min mayi m…Ē ampaŇčn…õ.¬Ľ K'aw…õnc aŇča Ňčanen…õ k…Ē moloku mam…Ēk…Ē.
37.28: K…Ē acam…ôs aMadiyaŇč aŇč…õ Ňčanccep…ôr m…Ē, Ňčamp…õn…õ Isifu d…ôk…ôl…ômp. K…Ē aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčancams…ôr k…Ē aMadiyaŇč gbeti nc…ômb…ôl w…ôco m…õr…ôŇč, k'aMadiyaŇč ŇčaŇčkek…ôr…õ Isifu Misira.
37.29: Nt…õ Ruben oluks…ôrn…õ k…ôdem…Ēm…ôn k…ôl…ômp disr…õ m…Ē, …õmb…ôp f…õ s…Ē Isifu k…ôl…ômp disr…õ. K'…õwal-wali y…õb…õrn…õ y…Ēn.
37.30: K'…õŇčkaf…ôl…õ nn…Ē aw…õnc aŇča Ňčayi m…Ē, k'oloku: ¬ęWan nw…õ eyi f…õ s…Ē nn…Ē d…ôk…ôl…ômp! C…ôke indey…Ē oŇč-…õ?¬Ľ
37.31: K…Ē Ňčal…õk burumus ba Isifu, k…Ē Ňčafay ambiyofo amera, k…Ē Ňčasop…ôt burumus bab…Ēk…Ē mecir.
37.32: K…Ē ŇčaŇčken…õ kas k…ôŇčan burumus b…Ēn…ĒŇčk…ôs…ôl lom ba Isifu bab…Ēk…Ē, k…Ē ŇčaŇčk…Ē Ňčacloku kas k…ôŇčan: ¬ęYamos yay…õ y…Ē s…ôŇčk…Ē s…ôn…ôŇčk. M…ôna s…Ē m…ôm…Ēm…ôn ma k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ a burumus ba wan kam b…Ē-…õ.¬Ľ
37.33: K…Ē Yakuba …õn…õp…ôl bi, k'oloku: ¬ęBurumus ba wan kem b…Ē! W…õs…õm w…õl…õc w…Ēl…Ēma w…Ēs…Ēm k…Ē! W…õs…õm w…õwat…ôri-wat…ôri k…Ē!¬Ľ

42.5: K…Ē awut a Yakuba ŇčaŇčk…Ē Misira k…ôk…Ēway mal…Ē p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē afum alar…ôm Ňčanck…Ē Misira d…ôk…ôway mal…Ē m…Ē, bawo dor d…õnayi at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč f…ôp. Isifu eyeŇčk…ôs ab…ôk…ôc Ňč…Ēn nn…Ē aw…õnc Ňčayi m…Ē

42.8: K…Ē Isifu …õn…õp…ôl aw…õnc aŇča. Mba aw…õnc aŇča Ňčanan…õp…ôl f…õ k…Ē.

42.10: K…Ē Ňčaloku Isifu: ¬ęAla, mariki mem, d…ôk…ôway yeri gb…ôc…ôr…ôm s…ônder.
42.11: D…õw…õnca d…Ē s…ôy…Ē f…ôp fosu, w…ôrkun w…ôkin okom su. S…ôs…Ēk…õn…õ b…ôk…ôc! S…ôclok'…ôm a d…ôk…ôt…õn yeri gb…ôc…ôr…ôm s…ônder.¬Ľ
42.12: K…Ē Isifu oloku Ňča: ¬ęK…ôbup…ôr…õ ti k…Ē n…ônd…õ, m…õtamb…ôr ma at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ m…Ē n…ônder k…ôt…õn n…ôk…Ēloku mi ndoronu.¬Ľ
42.13: K…Ē aw…õnc aŇča Ňčaloku Isifu: ¬ęW…ôco k…Ē m…õr…ôŇč w…Ē s…ônayi kas kosu k…ôkom nde KanaŇč. Mba w…ôk…Ē …õf…õt…õ su dac…Ē m…Ē eyi m…Ēk…Ē d…õk…õr k…Ē papa kosu, k…Ē w…ôkin …õnafi.¬Ľ

42.21: Ti t…Ē Ňčanay…Ē, Ňčaclok…õn…õ: ¬ę∆źy. S…ôn'…õnay…Ē ti w…õnc kosu. Bawo an…ôŇčk ay…õk Ňč…Ēn, t…õm nt…õ oncloku su a paŇčaŇčn…õn…õ k…Ē m…Ē, ta anc…ôŇčk…ôl…õ k…Ē-…õ. Ti t…Ē ay…õk Ňč…Ēn Ňčeyi k…ôsut…õ su tant…õ.¬Ľ
42.22: K…Ē Ruben …õl…õk moloku, k'oloku Ňča: ¬ęInaloku f…õ nu ti ba, ta n…ôy…Ē wan nw…õ p…ôl…õc? Mba n…ônac…ôŇčk…ôl f'em. Nd…õk…ôl oŇč awer su mecir m…Ēn.¬Ľ

42.28: K'oloku aw…õnc aŇča: ¬ęAluks'em p…ôsam pem. Ip…õmp…õ nn…Ē al…Ēba Ňčem.¬Ľ K…Ē mera yeyi Ňča yamayama k…ôc…ôr…õ a ŇčaŇčk…Ē d…ôk…ôway paluks…õ Ňča s…Ē p…ôsam paŇčan. K…Ē Ňčayifn…õ: ¬ęC…ôke c…Ē Kanu k…ôy…Ē su tant…õ-…õ?¬Ľ

K…Ē ina k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ a awut em Ňčandewur im d…ôwaca-…õ, awa Ňčawur im d…ôwaca!¬Ľ Isifu Ňčandi yeri k…Ē aw…õnc aŇča

43.26: Nt…õ Isifu ender d…õk…õr daŇč m…Ē, k…Ē Ňčas…ĒŇč Isifu yopoc…õ yaŇčan ny…õ Ňčanat…Ēmp…ôr…õn…õ k…Ē m…Ē, k…Ē Ňčantontn…õn…õ k…Ē d…ônt…Ēf.

43.28: K…Ē aw…õnc aŇča Ňčaloku: ¬ęW…ôcar kam, papa kosu …õntamn…õ, …Ēs…Ēr…Ēyi doru.¬Ľ K…Ē Ňčantontn…õn…õ Isifu.
43.29: K…Ē Isifu eyekti f…Ēr. Nt…õ …õn…ôŇčk BeŇčyamin w…ôpaŇčn…õ k…Ēn k…õr…õ m…Ē, k'eyif Ňča: ¬ęW…ôkaw…õ …Ēy…Ēn…õ w…ôf…õt konu w…ôlp…ôs, w…ôk…Ē n…ônalok'im tet…Ēn m…Ē?¬Ľ K'…Ēn…Ēc…ôr: ¬ęKanu k…ômar …ôm wan kem!¬Ľ
43.30: K…Ē Isifu oncop…ôr moloku, bawo …õnct…õy…õ-t…õy…õ p…ôbotu pa k…ôn…ôŇčk ka w…õnc, …õnafaŇč k…ôbok. K…Ē Isifu …õmb…õr…õ dukul…Ē d…Ēn, k'ombok di haŇč.
43.31: K…Ē Isifu …õsak k…ôbok, k'ombuf…ôrn…õ k…ôro, k'owur. K'…õs…õp k…ôt…Ēbok s…Ē f…Ēr ya aw…õnc aŇča kiriŇč. K'oloku: ¬ęN…ôwur…õn…õ su yeri.¬Ľ
43.32: K'amb…õr…õ Isifu yeri taciŇča, aw…õnc aŇča taciŇča, k…Ē aMisira Ňča Ňčayi s…Ē taciŇča. Bawo aMisira Ňčancwos…õ f…õ k…ôpaŇčn…õ dap da yeri k…Ē aHeb…ôre.
43.33: K…Ē aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčand…õ f…Ēr y…Ēn kiriŇč. K…ôy…õf…õ ka coco ca papa k…ôŇčan haŇč w…ôf…õt k…ôŇčan nw…õ o nw…õ k…Ē d…ôk…ônd…õ d…Ēn. K…Ē Ňčay…õf…õ k…ôlok…õn…õ k…ôciyan…õ nk…õ k…ôyi Ňča nt…õ Isifu osump…ôr Ňča m…Ē.
43.34: K…Ē Isifu …õmb…õr…õn…õ Ňča yeri y…Ēn ny…õ nk…Ēn encdi m…Ē. Mba p…õb…õr…õn…õ mp…õ …õnas…ĒŇč BeŇčyamin m…Ē p…õnala k…ôcam…ôt, p…õtas pa ak…Ē. K…Ē Ňčamun haŇč k…Ē p…ônt…ôŇčn…õ Ňča k…Ē nk…Ēn Isifu.

44.1: K…Ē Isifu oloku w…ôcams…õ k…Ēn: ¬ęM…ôlas…õ afum akaŇč…õ mal…Ē d…ôl…Ēba p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē l…Ēba yaŇčan y…õntam k…ôl…õk mal…Ē m…Ē. M…ôb…õr p…ôsam paŇčan nde l…Ēba yaŇčan disr…õ.

44.3: Dec dendes…Ēk, k'asak afum aŇč…õ k…ôlukus nde ndaraŇčan k…Ē s…Ēfale s…ôŇčan.
44.4: Ňäawur dare disr…õ ta Ňčantab…Ēl…õ-…õ, k…Ē Isifu oloku w…ôcams…õ k…Ēn: ¬ęM…ôy…õf…õ m…ôc…ôm…õ afum aŇč…õ dar…ôŇč haŇč m…ôb…ôp Ňča. M…ôyif Ňča: ‚ÄĻTa ake t…Ē n…ôs…ĒŇč…õ p…ôt…Ēt k…ôway p…ôl…õc-…õ?
44.5: Baf…Ē ap…Ēt ŇčaŇč…õ Ňč…Ē mariki mem oŇčmun…õ, Ňč…Ēs…ĒŇč…õ k…Ē k…ôc…ôr…õ t…Ēk…Ē tender m…Ē ba? N…ônciya k…ôy…Ē tant…õ n…ôy…Ē m…Ē.‚Äļ¬Ľ
44.6: K…Ē w…ôcams…õ ka Isifu …õmb…õl…ôr Ňča k'…õmb…ôp Ňča. K'…ĒŇčgb…Ēk…ôr…õn…õ Ňča moloku m…Ēk…Ē Isifu …õnasom k…Ē m…Ē.
44.7: K…Ē Ňčaloku w…ôcams…õ ka Isifu: ¬ęTa ake t…Ē mariki oŇčlok-lok…ôr…õ su tant…õ-…õ? S…ôna amar…ôs am s…ôf…Ētam k…ôy…Ē tat…Ēk…Ē.

44.10: K…Ē w…ôcams…õ ka Isifu oloku Ňča: ¬ęAwa. Ine nu sim! Nw…õ o nw…õ aŇčn…ôŇčk…õ paka m…Ē, …ĒŇčy…Ēn…õ w…ôcar kem. N…ôna alp…ôs aŇč…õ n…ôŇčk…Ē.¬Ľ
44.11: K…Ē Ňčamb…õlk…ôr-b…õlk…ôr k…ôtor…õ-tor…õ l…Ēba yaŇčan d…ônt…Ēf k…Ē Ňčasik…ôli-sik…ôli yi.
44.12: K…Ē w…ôcams…õ ka Isifu oncop k…ôfen-feni k…ôy…õf…õ al…Ēba Ňča w…ôbeki, k'…õl…ôps…ôr al…Ēba Ňča w…ôf…õt. K…Ē w…ôcams…õ ka Isifu …ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôn…ôŇčk ap…Ēt nŇč…õ nde al…Ēba Ňča BeŇčyamin.
44.13: K…Ē aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčawal-wali yamos yaŇčan, k…Ē Ňčand…ônd…ôs…ôr s…Ē s…Ēfale s…ôŇčan l…Ēba yaŇčan. K…Ē Ňčaluks…ôrn…õ s…Ē dare disr…õ. Yuda k…ôc…Ēp…õ BeŇčyamin
44.14: Yuda k…Ē aw…õnc aŇča Ňčander s…Ē nda Isifu w…ôk…Ē …õnas…Ēr…Ēyi k…ôfo kaŇčk…Ē Ňčanasak k…Ē m…Ē. K…Ē Ňčant…õmp…õn…õ d…ônt…Ēf Isifu f…Ēr kiriŇč.
44.15: K…Ē Isifu eyif Ňča: ¬ęC…ôke c…Ē n…ôy…Ē tant…õ-…õ? N…ônc…ôr…õ f…õ a intam k…ôc…ôr…õ t…Ēk…Ē t…ĒŇčgb…Ēpn…õ m…Ē, t…Ēk…Ē tender m…Ē?¬Ľ
44.16: K…Ē Yuda oloku: ¬ęC…ôke c'indeloku mariki mem-…õ? C…ôke c'indeloku m…ôtam k…ôlaŇč su-…õ? Kanu k…ômb…ôp amar…ôs am Ňčaciya. S…ôy…Ēn…õ oŇč acar a mariki mosu, k…ôy…õf…õ s…ôna haŇč w…ôk…Ē an…ôŇčk ap…Ēt al…Ēba Ňč…Ēn disr…õ m…Ē.¬Ľ
44.17: K…Ē Isifu oloku: ¬ęIf…Ēdeb…ôc ti tat…Ēk…Ē! Fum nw…õ an…ôŇčk…õ ap…Ēt m…Ē, endey…Ēn…õ w…ôcar kem. K…Ē n…ôna, n…ôp…õrn…õ n…ôk…Ē ndena papa konu b…ôk…ôc yoforu disr…õ.¬Ľ
44.18: K…Ē Yuda …Ēl…Ēt…ôrn…õ Isifu k'oloku k…Ē: ¬ęIl…Ēkt…ôrn'am mariki, m…ôwos…õ w…ômar…ôs kam p…ôlok-lok…ôr …ôm ta ab…ôk…ôc Ňč…õp'am nn…Ē eyi m…Ē! Bawo m…ôyi p…ôm…Ē Firawona.
44.19: T…Ēc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē Mariki …õnayif…ôt amar…ôs …Ēn p…ôcloku: ‚ÄĻN…ôy…Ē kas k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ f…õ ti-…õ w…ôf…õt ba?‚Äļ
44.20: K…Ē s…ôwos…õn…õ k…Ē: ‚ÄĻS…ôy…Ē kas k…ôtem, k…Ē w…ôf…õt wan nw…õ oŇčkom detem d…Ēn disr…õ m…Ē. W…ôpaŇčn…õ k…Ēn k…õr…õ …õnafi. K…õr…õ k…Ēn k…ôkom, sona s'eyi oŇč, k…Ē kas …Ēmb…Ēt…ôr k…Ē.‚Äļ
44.21: K…Ē m…ôloku amar…ôs am: ‚ÄĻN…ôk…Ē n…ôk…õr…õ w…ôf…õt konu in…ôŇčk k…Ē f…Ēr yem.‚Äļ
44.22: K…Ē s…ôloku mariki mem: ‚ÄĻW…ôf…õt kosu …Ēf…Ētam k…ôy…õf…õ papa kosu k…ôs…ôk. K'…õy…õf…õ k…Ē k…ôs…ôk-…õ, papa kosu eŇčfi.‚Äļ
44.23: K…Ē m…ôloku amar…ôs am: ‚ÄĻK…Ē n…ônt…Ēk…õr…õ w…ôf…õt konu-…õ, ta in…ôŇčk nu s…Ē d…õ.‚Äļ
44.24: Nt…õ s…ôluks…ôrn…õ ndena papa kosu w…ômar…ôs kam m…Ē, k…Ē s…ôluks…õ k…Ē moloku ma m…ôna mariki mem.
44.25: K…Ē papa kosu oloku: ‚ÄĻN…ôk…Ē s…Ē n…ôway…õ su yeri yepic.‚Äļ
44.26: K…Ē s…ôloku k…Ē: ‚ÄĻS…ôf…Ētam k…ôk…Ē. Mba k…Ē s…ôŇčsol…õ w…ôf…õt kosu-…õ, s…ôŇčk…Ē, bawo w…ôrkun w…ôkak…Ē …Ēf…Ēwos…õ k…ôn…ôŇčk su c…ôro ta s…ôŇčken…õ k…Ē w…ôf…õt kosu p…ôn…ôŇčk-…õ.‚Äļ

44.31: eŇčfi katina k…Ē …Ēnt…Ēn…ôŇčk…õ su w…ôf…õt kosu-…õ. T…õm tat…Ēk…Ē amar…ôs am Ňčandes…ĒŇč…õ w…ômar…ôs kam papa kosu k…ôtor…õn…õ c…ôfon c…Ēn c…ôfer dabiya p…ôcuy disr…õ.
44.32: Bawo ina w…ômar…ôs kam is…ĒŇč k…Ē temer k…ôluks…õ k…Ē s…Ē wan k…Ēn, icloku papa kosu: ‚ÄĻK'int…Ēluks'am w…ôf…õt kosu-…õ, in'endesar…õ kiciya doru o doru nn…Ē papa kem eyi m…Ē!‚Äļ

45.1: Isifu …õnatam f…õ s…Ē k…ôm…õŇčk m…õnc…ôr nn…Ē afum ak…Ē Ňčanayi k…Ē k…ôs…ôk m…Ē dac…Ē, k'oŇčkul…õ: ¬ęN…ôwur…õn…õ afum f…ôp!¬Ľ Ali w…ôkin …õnayi f…õ s…Ē Isifu k…ôs…ôk nt…õ encment…ôrn…õ aw…õnc aŇča m…Ē.

45.4: K…Ē Isifu oloku aw…õnc aŇča: ¬ęIl…õts…õn…õ nu, n…ôl…Ēt…ôrn'em.¬Ľ K…Ē Ňčal…Ēt…ôrn…õ k…Ē. K'oloku Ňča s…Ē: ¬ęIn'…Ēf…Ē Isifu w…õnc konu nw…õ n…ônacam…ôs a k…Ē aŇčk…õr…õ k…Ē Misira m…Ē.
45.5: Nd…õk…ôl oŇč, ta n…ôwak…ôsn…õ. Ta p…ôt…õl…õ nu k…ôcam…ôs kem pak…õr'em nn…Ē, bawo k…ôbum konu, n…ôyi doru k…Ē Kanu k…ônab…õlk…ôr'em k…ôk…õr…õ nn…Ē, iyi nu kiriŇč.
45.6: Teren ta m…õr…ôŇč ta dor t…Ē tant…õ d…Ēt…Ēf. P…ônc…ôm…õ meren k…ôcam…ôt af…Ēde pacbifti, af…Ēde pact…õl.
45.7: Kanu k…ôk…õr'em iyi nu kiriŇč, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ nu k…ôs…Ēt…Ē ka nn…Ē at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ yuruya m…Ē, imar nu ta n…ôfi, icbum nu p…ôyeŇčki pamp…õ ayi k…ôcep…ôr…õn…õ m…Ē.
45.8: Nd…õk…ôl oŇč, baf…Ē n…ôn'…õk…õr'em nn…Ē, mba Kanu k…Ē. Kanu k…ônc…ômb…ôr im iy…Ēn…õ papa ka Firawona, mariki ma k…ôl…Ē k…Ēn disr…õ, w…ôkiriŇč ka s…ôdare sa Misira f…ôp.
45.9: N…ôrokn…õ n…ôp…õ nde papa kem eyi m…Ē. N…ôk…Ē n…ôloku k…Ē: ‚ÄĻNt…õ t…Ē wan kam Isifu …õnaloku su: Kanu k…ônc…ômb…ôr im mariki ma at…Ēf Ňča Misira f…ôp. Ta m…ôwon k…ôder nn…Ē iyi m…Ē!
45.10: Nde at…Ēf Ňča Kos…õŇč Ňč…Ē m…ôŇčk…Ēyi, m…ôf…Ēdeb…Ēl'em, k…ôy…õf…õ m…ôna papa k…ôb…ôp awut am, awut-s…Ē am, y…Ēc…Ēl yam y…Ēp…ĒŇč k…Ē y…õf…õt haŇč ca ny…õ m…ôy…Ē m…Ē f…ôp.
45.11: Nn…Ē taŇč indetam k…ôcs…ĒŇč …ôm ca f…ôp bawo p…ôs…Ēr…Ēc…ôm…õ meren k…ôcam…ôt a dor declip. Ti disr…õ dor d…Ēf…Ēdesump…ôr y…Ēk…Ē m…ôy…Ē m…Ē.‚Äļ¬Ľ
45.12: ¬ęF…Ēt…Ē n…ôŇčgb…ôtn…õ ti f…Ēr yonu, k…Ē w…ôf…õt kem BeŇčyamin …õŇčgb…ôt…ôn'em f…Ēr y…Ēn yati a in'oŇčlok-lok…ôr nu.
45.13: N…ôk…Ē n…ôloku papa kem k…Ē p…ôlel mp…õ is…Ēt…Ē Misira m…Ē f…ôp. N…ôl…Ēm…ôr k…Ē nt…õ n…ôn…ôŇčk d…õ m…Ē f…ôp. N…ôrokn…õ n…ôtor…õn…õ papa kem nn…Ē iyi m…Ē.¬Ľ
45.14: K…Ē Isifu …õnaps…ôrn…õ s…Ē w…ôf…õt k…Ēn BeŇčyamin d…ôkilim, k…Ē Ňčay…õf…õ k…ôbok.

45.17: K…Ē Firawona oloku Isifu: ¬ęM…ôloku aw…õnc …ôm aŇča: ‚ÄĻN…ôy…Ē nt…õ: N…ôl…õk y…Ēc…Ēl yonu, n…ôk…Ē at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč.
45.18: N…ôl…õk papa konu k…Ē afum …Ēn, n…ôder nn…Ē iyi m…Ē. Indey…Ēn…õ nu nt…õ o nt…õ tentes…õ at…Ēf Ňča Misira m…Ē. N…ônde n…ôcdi yeri yoboŇču ya Misira.‚Äļ
45.19: Iwos'am k…ôloku aw…õnc …ôm aŇča: ‚ÄĻN…ôy…Ē nt…õ: N…ôl…õk cibil at…Ēf Ňča Misira, n…ôk…Ē n…ôl…õk awut k…Ē aran anu k…Ē papa konu n…ôder.‚Äļ
45.20: Ta n…ôŇčaŇčn…õ m…õl…ôr teta ca yonu y…Ēk…Ē n…ôndek…Ēsak di m…Ē, bawo mp…õ o mp…õ peyi at…Ēf Ňča Misira p…Ēy…Ēn…õ p…Ēt…Ēt m…Ē, pendey…Ēn…õ ponu.¬Ľ
45.21: K…Ē awut a Yakuba Ňčay…Ē tat…Ēk…Ē. K…Ē Isifu …Ēs…ĒŇč aw…õnc aŇča cibil p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē Firawona …õnasom k…Ē ti m…Ē. K'…Ēs…ĒŇč Ňča s…Ē yeri y…Ēk…Ē Ňčanak…Ē k…ôcdi d…Ēp…Ē m…Ē.

45.23: Ca ny…õ y…Ē Isifu …õnas…ĒŇč paken…õ kas k…ôŇčan: S…Ēfale surkun w…ôco s…ôsar…õ ca y…Ēt…Ēt ya Misira, k…Ē s…Ēfale s…ôran w…ôco s…ôsar…õ mal…Ē, c…ôcom k…Ē yeri ta nt…õ …ĒŇčk…Ēsump…ôr d…Ēp…Ē k…ôder Misira m…Ē.
45.24: K…Ē Isifu …õsak aw…õnc aŇča k…Ē Ňčalukus. K'oloku Ňča: ¬ęTa n…ôk…Ēc…Ēp d…Ēp…Ē de!¬Ľ
45.25: K…Ē aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčay…õf…õ Misira k…Ē Ňčamp…õ KanaŇč ndena papa k…ôŇčan Yakuba.
45.26: K…Ē aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčaloku kas k…ôŇčan teta Isifu kiyi k…Ēn doru s…Ē. K…Ē Ňčaloku kas k…ôŇčan a Isifu …Ēy…Ēn…õ w…ôb…õ w…ôka at…Ēf Ňča Misira f…ôp. Mba ab…ôk…ôc Ňč…õnap…õ f…õ Yakuba bawo …õnalaŇč f…õ Ňča.
45.27: K…Ē Ňčal…Ēm…ôr k…Ē moloku m…Ēk…Ē Isifu …õnasom Ňča m…Ē f…ôp. Nt…õ Yakuba …õnan…ôŇčk cibil c…ôk…Ē Isifu …õnasak k…ôdel…õk k…Ē m…Ē, ti t…õnas…ĒŇč…õ k…Ē oŇč ab…ôk…ôc k…ôp…õ.
45.28: K…Ē Yakuba oloku: ¬ęIlaŇč ti oŇč! Wan kem Isifu …Ēs…Ēr…Ēyi doru! Indek…Ēn…ôŇčk k…Ē a icfi.¬Ľ

46.1: K…Ē Yakuba …ĒŇčk…Ē k…Ē ca y…Ēk…Ē …õnay…Ē m…Ē. Nt…õ …õmb…õr…õ Bersaba m…Ē, k'oloŇčn…õ di Kanu ka papa k…Ēn Siyaka.
46.2: K…Ē Kanu k…ôlok-lok…ôr Yakuba k…ôn…ôŇčk ka pibi disr…õ. K…Ē Kanu k…ôwe k…Ē: ¬ęYakuba! Yakuba!¬Ľ K'owos…õ: ¬ęIn'…õw…õ!¬Ľ
46.3: K…Ē Kanu k…ôloku k…Ē: ¬ęIn'…Ēf…Ē ina Kanu, Kanu ka papa kam. Ta m…ônes…õ k…ôtor ka Misira. Bawo dif…Ē iŇčk…Ēs…ĒŇč'am k…ôy…Ēn…õ ka kas ka afum alar…ôm.
46.4: S…ôn'endesol k…ôtor ka Misira. In'endes…ĒŇč'am s…Ē k…ôp…õ. Isifu yati endem…õp'…ôm f…Ēr waca w…Ēn.¬Ľ
46.5: K…Ē Yakuba …õy…õf…õ Bersaba. K…Ē awut a Yakuba ŇčaŇčkek…ôr…õ kas k…ôŇčan, aran aŇčan, k…Ē awut aŇčan cibil ca d…ônt…Ēf disr…õ nc…õ Firawona …õnas…ĒŇč pak…Ē k…õr…õ Ňča m…Ē.
46.6: K…Ē Ňčal…õk s…Ē y…Ēc…Ēl yaŇčan k…Ē ca y…Ēk…Ē Ňčanas…Ēt…Ē at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč m…Ē. K…Ē Yakuba …ĒŇčk…Ē Misira k…Ē afum …Ēn f…ôp.
46.7: K'eŇčken…õn…õ at…Ēf Ňča Misira yuruya y…Ēn f…ôp, awut …Ēn arkun k…Ē awut-s…Ē …Ēn arkun, awut …Ēn aran k…Ē awut-s…Ē …Ēn aran. D…õlay da afum a Yakuba
46.8: Mewe ma awut a Yakuba m…Ē mm…õ, aŇč…õ Ňčanak…Ē Misira m…Ē. Yakuba k…Ē awut …Ēn: Coco ca Yakuba, Ruben.
46.9: Awut a Ruben: Henok, Palu, Hec…ôr…ĒŇč, k…Ē Karmi.
46.10: Awut a Simey…ĒŇč: Yemuy…õl, Yamin, Ohad, Yakin, k…Ē Cohar, k…Ē Sawul wan w…ôrkun w…ôka w…ôKanaŇčara.
46.11: Awut a Lewy: Kerson, Kehat, k…Ē Merari.
46.12: Awut a Yuda: H…õr, Onan, S…õlah, Per…õc, k…Ē Serah, mba H…õr k…Ē Onan Ňčanafi nde at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč. Awut a Per…õc Ňčanay…Ēn…õ Hec…ôr…ĒŇč k…Ē Hamul.
46.13: Awut a Isakar: Tola, Puwa, Y…Ēb, k…Ē Simr…ĒŇč.
46.14: Awut a Sebul…ĒŇč: Sered, ∆źl…ĒŇč, k…Ē Yahal…õl.
46.15: Awut akaŇč…õ Ňč…Ē Leya …õnakom…õ Yakuba nde PadaŇč-Aram, mba wan k…Ēn w…ôran Dina eyi f…õ ti. K…ôl…õk awut …Ēn aran haŇč arkun, Ňčanak…Ē afum w…ôco maas (33).
46.16: Awut a Kadu: Cify…Ēn, Haki, Suni, Ec…ôb…ĒŇč, Eri, Arodi, k…Ē Areli.
46.17: Awut a As…õr: Yima, Yisuwa, Yisuwi, k…Ē Beriya, k…Ē Sera w…ôkir…õ k…ôŇčan. Wan ka Beriya: Heb…õr k…Ē Malkiy…õl.
46.18: Awut a Silpa w…ômar…ôs nw…õ LabaŇč …õnas…ĒŇč wan k…Ēn w…ôran Leya m…Ē, Ňč…Ē akak…Ē aŇč…õ …õnakom…õ Yakuba m…Ē. Ňäanayi afum w…ôco k…Ē cam…ôt-tin (16).
46.19: Awut a Ras…õl, w…ôran ka Yakuba: Isifu k…Ē BeŇčyamin.
46.20: K…Ē Isifu nk…Ēn oŇčkom Misira awut m…õr…ôŇč: Manase k…Ē ∆źfrayim, aŇč…õ Asnat wan w…ôran ka Potifera w…ôloŇčn…õ ka dare da Hon, …õnakom…õ Isifu m…Ē.
46.21: Awut a BeŇčyamin: Bela, Bek…õr, Asub…õl, Kera, Naman, Ehi, R…Ēs, Mupim, Hupim, k…Ē Ardu.
46.22: Yuruya yay…õ y…Ē Ras…õl …õnas…Ēt…Ēn…õ nk…Ēn Yakuba, Ňčanayi afum w…ôco k…Ē maŇčk…ôl…õ (14).
46.24: Mewe ma awut a Naftali m…õm…õ: Yacel, Kumi, Yecer, k…Ē Silem.
46.25: Awut a Bilha Ňč…Ē akak…Ē, Bilha nw…õ LabaŇč …õnas…ĒŇč wan k…Ēn w…ôran Ras…õl m…Ē p…ôy…Ē k…Ē w…ôcar, k'oŇčkom…õ Ňča Yakuba. Ňäanayi afum cam…ôt-m…õr…ôŇč.
46.26: Afum aŇč…õ Ňčanac…õps…õ Yakuba k…ôk…Ē ka Misira m…Ē, Ňčanayi afum w…ôco cam…ôt tin k…Ē cam…ôt tin (66) aŇč…õ Ňčanay…Ēn…õ akom …Ēn m…Ē, al…Ēm f…õ aran a awut …Ēn arkun de.
46.27: Awut a Isifu aŇč…õ …õnakom Misira m…Ē: Ňäanayi awut m…õr…ôŇč. Afum a Yakuba aŇč…õ Ňčanac…ôps…õ k…Ē dar…ôŇč k…ôk…Ē ka Misira m…Ē, Ňčanayi f…ôp faŇčan afum w…ôco cam…ôt m…õr…ôŇč (70). Yakuba k…ônd…õ k…Ēn nde Misira
46.28: K…Ē Yakuba osom Yuda p…ôyi k…Ē kiriŇč k…ôk…Ē ka Kos…õŇč ndena Isifu. K…Ē Yuda …õmb…õr…õ at…Ēf Ňča Kos…õŇč.
46.29: K…Ē Isifu …õl…õk abil Ňč…Ēn k'…õmp…õ Kos…õŇč k…ôk…Ēb…ôp…õn…õ k…Ē papa k…Ēn Yakuba. Isifu ŇčaŇčk…Ēwur…ôr…õn…õ k…Ē papa k…Ēn, k'…õnaps…ôrn…õ k…Ē d…ôkilim k'…õy…õf…õ k…ôbok. K'ombok haŇč.
46.30: K…Ē Yakuba oloku Isifu: ¬ęIntam oŇč k…ôfi bawo in…ôŇčk …ôm k…ôro, k'inc…ôr…õ oŇč a m…ôyi doru!¬Ľ
46.31: K…Ē Isifu oloku aw…õnc aŇča k…Ē afum a papa k…Ēn: ¬ęIlukus ik…Ē iluks…õ Firawona k…ôb…õr…õ konu. Ik…Ē iloku k…Ē a: ‚ÄĻAw…õnc im aŇča k…Ē afum a papa kem aŇč…õ Ňčanayi at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč m…Ē, Ňčander nn…Ē iyi m…Ē.
46.32: Afum ak…õk a Ňčkesiya, cir, k…Ē c…ôna Ňč…Ē Ňčay…Ēn…õ, bawo ak…õk a ac…Ēl Ňč…Ē. ŇäaŇčk…õr…õ y…Ēc…Ēl yaŇčan f…ôp k…Ē ca yaŇčan.‚Äļ
46.33: K…Ē t…õm tendeb…ôp nt…õ Firawona endewe nu p…ôcyif nu: ‚ÄĻAke'y…Ēn…õ y…õb…ôc yonu-…õ?‚Äļ
46.34: N…ôcloku k…Ē: ‚ÄĻS…ôn'acar am, ak…õk Ňč…Ē s…ôy…Ēn…õ, k…ôy…õf…õ d…õt…õmp dosu haŇč m…Ēk…Ē, y…õb…ôc yay…Ēk…Ē y…Ē s…ômb…ôp…õ akomb…ôra asu.‚Äļ Ti disr…õ, n…ôyi Kos…õŇč, bawo p…ôcyik-yik aMisira k…ônd…õ k…Ē ak…õk a Ňčkesiya k…Ē cir.¬Ľ

47.1: K…Ē Isifu …ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôluks…õ ti Firawona. K'oloku k…Ē: ¬ęAw…õnc im aŇča k…Ē papa kem Ňčander k…ôy…õf…õ ka at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč k…Ē y…Ēc…Ēl yaŇčan Ňčkesiya, cir k…Ē c…ôna k…ôb…ôp ka ca yaŇčan f…ôp. Ňäayi tant…õ at…Ēf Ňča Kos…õŇč.¬Ľ
47.2: K…Ē Isifu …õl…õk aw…õnc aŇča k…ôcam…ôt k'ement…ôr Ňča Firawona.
47.3: K…Ē Firawona eyif aw…õnc a Isifu: ¬ęAke'y…Ēn…õ y…õb…ôc yonu-…õ?¬Ľ K…Ē aw…õnc a Isifu Ňčaloku Firawona: ¬ęS…ôn'acar am, ak…õk a Ňčkesiya, cir k…Ē c…ôna Ňč…Ē s…ôy…Ēn…õ p…ôm…Ē papa kosu aŇča.¬Ľ
47.4: K…Ē Ňčaloku s…Ē Firawona: ¬ęS…ônder k…ôdend…õ at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ, bawo d…ôk…ôc…Ēl deyi f…õ s…Ē nde acar am Ňčay…õf…õ m…Ē, k…Ē dor d…õmb…õk k…ôb…õk d…ôm at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč. M…ôwos…õ oŇč acar am k…ônd…õ at…Ēf Ňča Kos…õŇč.¬Ľ
47.5: K…Ē Firawona oloku Isifu: ¬ęPapa kam k…Ē aw…õnc …ôm aŇča Ňčander nn…Ē m…ôyi m…Ē.
47.6: At…Ēf Ňča Misira Ňčey'…ôm d…ôwaca, m…ôd…ôs papa kam k…Ē aw…õnc …ôm aŇča nn…Ē p…ôntes…õ Ňča Kos…õŇč m…Ē, k…Ē m…ônc…ôr…õ s…Ē aw…õnc …ôm aŇča dac…Ē afum alompu-…õ, m…ôc…ômb…ôr Ňča Ňčack…õks'em y…Ēc…Ēl.¬Ľ
47.7: K…Ē Isifu …õŇčk…õr…õ papa k…Ēn Yakuba k…ôdement…ôr k…Ē Firawona. K…Ē Yakuba ontolan…õ Firawona.
47.8: K…Ē Firawona eyif Yakuba: ¬ęMeren c…ôke m…Ē m…ôyi doru-…õ?¬Ľ
47.9: K…Ē Yakuba oloku k…Ē: ¬ęMeren mm…õ is…Ēt…Ē k…ôcep…õ-cep…õ disr…õ m…Ē, m…õmb…ôp meren tasar tin k…Ē w…ôco maas (130), kiyi kem doru k…ôncep…ôr kat…ôna kat…ôna. Incep…ôr…õn…õ meren meyeŇčki kiyi kem doru. Intas…Ēt…Ē f…õ meren mm…õ akomb…ôra em Ňčanas…Ēt…Ē m…Ē, mba tecep…ôr…õn…õ doru tin tayi t…Ē s…ôncep…ôr…õn…õ doru.¬Ľ
47.10: K…Ē Yakuba ontolan…õ s…Ē Firawona. K'…õy…õf…õ, k'…õsak k…Ē.
47.11: K…Ē Isifu …õnd…ôs papa k…Ēn k…Ē aw…õnc aŇča at…Ēf Ňča Misira. K'…Ēs…ĒŇč Ňča ant…Ēf Misira, nde at…Ēf Ňča Rams…õs, p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē Firawona …õnaloku k…Ē ti m…Ē.
47.12: K…Ē Isifu …õntam oŇč k…ôgb…õk…ôr…õ papa k…Ēn, aw…õnc aŇča, k…Ē aka k…ôl…Ē ka papa k…Ēn f…ôp p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē Ňčanalan…õn…õ m…Ē. Isifu k…ôk…Ēt…õn…õ mes ma Misira
47.13: Yeri y…õnayi f…õ s…Ē at…Ēf Ňča Misira f…ôp, bawo dor d…õnas…Ēt…Ē f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr. At…Ēf Ňča Misira k…Ē at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč dor d…õncl…õŇčk…ôs oŇč k…ôl…õŇčk…ôs d…ôm afum a t…Ēf yay…Ēk…Ē.
47.14: K…Ē Isifu …õw…õt…ôs gbeti f…ôp mb…õ b…õnayi at…Ēf Ňča Misira k…Ē at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč m…Ē. P…ôcs…ôkp…ôr…õ gbeti bab…Ēk…Ē mal…Ē, k…Ē Isifu …õmb…õrs…õ gbeti bab…Ēk…Ē nde k…ôl…Ē ka Firawona.
47.15: Nt…õ gbeti ba Misira k…Ē KanaŇč belip m…Ē, k…Ē aMisira f…ôp Ňčander nn…Ē Isifu eyi m…Ē. K…Ē Ňčaloku: ¬ęM…ôs…ĒŇč su yeri! Cep…Ē s…ôndefi f…Ēr yam kiriŇč bawo gbeti beyi f…õ s…Ē?¬Ľ
47.16: K…Ē Isifu oloku: ¬ęN…ôs…ĒŇč y…Ēc…Ēl yonu. IŇčs…ĒŇč nu k…ôcom k…ôs…ôkp…õ ka y…Ēc…Ēl yonu, bawo gbeti beyi f…õ s…Ē.¬Ľ
47.17: K…Ē ŇčaŇčk…õr…õ Isifu y…Ēc…Ēl yaŇčan. K…Ē Isifu …ĒŇčs…ĒŇč Ňča yeri k…ôs…ôkp…õ ka y…Ēc…Ēl yaŇčan: F…ôl…õs, y…Ēc…Ēl y…õf…õt k…Ē y…Ēp…ĒŇč, s…Ēfale. K…Ē Isifu …Ēs…ĒŇč Ňča yeri ya teren tat…Ēk…Ē k…ôs…ôkp…õ ka y…Ēc…Ēl yaŇčan f…ôp.
47.18: Nt…õ teren tat…Ēk…Ē tencep…ôr m…Ē, k…Ē aka Misira Ňčander s…Ē nn…Ē Isifu eyi m…Ē teren t…Ēck…Ēs…Ēk. K…Ē Ňčaloku k…Ē: ¬ęS…ôf…Ētam k…ôm…õŇčk…ôr mariki mem a gbeti bosu belip, k…Ē y…Ēc…Ēl yosu yelip. Daka o daka d…õnc…ôm…õ f…õ su s…Ē, m…õn…õ dis dosu k…Ē nt…Ēf yosu.
47.19: S…ôndefi oŇč f…Ēr yam kiriŇč ba, k…Ē nt…Ēf yosu? M…ôway su k…Ē nt…Ēf yosu k…ôs…ôkp…õ ka yeri. T…õm tat…Ēk…Ē s…ôy…Ēn…õ acar a Firawona, s…ôna k…Ē nt…Ēf yosu. M…ôs…ĒŇč su defet s…ôb…ôc ta s…ôdefi, nt…Ēf yosu yedef…ônt…ôr…õ gb…ôlm…ôs.¬Ľ
47.20: K…Ē Isifu …õway…õ Firawona nt…Ēf ya Misira f…ôp, aka Misira f…ôp Ňčanacam…ôs nt…Ēf yaŇčan, bawo dor d…õnab…õk…ôr Ňča. K…Ē at…Ēf Ňč…Ēy…Ēn…õ oŇč Ňča Firawona.
47.21: K…Ē Firawona …õl…õk afum aŇč…õ Ňčanayi d…ôc…ôl…ônc…ôr ca Misira m…Ē, k'…õŇčk…õr…õ Ňča s…ôdare s…ôp…ĒŇč.
47.22: Mba Isifu …õnaway f…õ nt…Ēf ya aloŇčn…õ, bawo Firawona …õnam…Ēn…õ k…ôway ka nt…Ēf yaŇčan. AloŇčn…õ Ňčayi k…ôk…õk…ôs ka Firawona disr…õ, ti t…Ē aloŇčn…õ Ňčanat…Ēcams…õ nt…Ēf yaŇčan.
47.23: K…Ē Isifu oloku afum a Misira: ¬ęIway nu m…Ēk…Ē k…Ē nt…Ēf yonu, n…ôy…Ēn…õ m…Ēk…Ē aka Firawona. Defet d…õnd…õ: N…ôntam k…ôb…Ēf d…ônt…Ēf.
47.24: K…Ē n…ônde n…ôct…õl-…õ, n…ôde n…ôcs…ĒŇč faril…õ poboc pin pa y…õt…õl yonu Firawona. N…ôna n…ôl…õk yoboc maŇčk…ôl…õ ny…õ, yendey…Ēn…õ nu yeri ya d…õk…õr k…Ē awut, y…Ēy…Ēn…õ nu s…Ē defet da teren t…Ēc…Ēnc m…Ē.¬Ľ
47.25: K…Ē Ňčaloku Firawona: ¬ęM…ôluks…õ su k…ôyi doru! S…ôs…Ēt…Ē k…ôŇčaŇčn…õn…õ ka mariki mosu, s…ôndey…Ēn…õ acar a Firawona.¬Ľ
47.26: K…Ē Isifu …õnc…ômb…ôr ti k…Ē t…Ēy…Ēn…õ m…Ēk…Ē t…Ēy…Ē ta Misira: Poboc pa k…ôcam…ôt f…ôp pa Firawona p…Ē. M…õn…õ nt…Ēf ya aloŇčn…õ gb…ôc…ôr…ôm y…Ēt…Ēy…Ēn…õ ya Firawona. M…õfaŇč ma Yakuba m…õlp…ôs
47.27: K…Ē Yakuba …õnd…õ at…Ēf Ňča Misira, at…Ēf Ňča Kos…õŇč. K…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ di ndaraŇčan k'…Ēy…Ēn…õ kas ka afum alar…ôm.
47.28: K…Ē Yakuba eyi doru meren w…ôco k…Ē cam…ôt-m…õr…ôŇč (17) at…Ēf Ňča Misira. K…ôwon ka Yakuba doru f…ôp k…ônas…Ēt…Ē meren tasar tin w…ôco maŇčk…ôl…õ k…Ē cam…ôt m…õr…ôŇč (147).
47.29: Mataka ma Yakuba k…ôl…Ēt…ôs k…ôlip, k'ewe wan k…Ēn Isifu k'oloku k…Ē: ¬ęK…Ē m…ôfaŇč k…ômar im-…õ, m…ôboc k…ôca kam al…ôŇčk Ňčem tant…Ēf, m…ôl…õk'em layidi p…ôsoku disr…õ nd…õ m…ôndet…Ēmp…ôr'em m…Ē: Il…õts…õn'am ta m…ôwup im Misira!
47.30: K'indef…ônt…ôr…õ k…Ē papa kem aŇča-…õ, m…ôwur…õn'em Misira. M…ôk…Ē m…ôwup im nde kufu k…ôŇčan k…ôyi m…Ē.¬Ľ K…Ē Isifu oloku k…Ē: ¬ęIndey…Ē t…Ēk…Ē m…ôlok'im m…Ē.¬Ľ
47.31: K…Ē Yakuba oloku: ¬ęM…ôd…õr…ôm'em ti.¬Ľ K…Ē Isifu …õnd…õrm…õ k…Ē ti. K…Ē Yakuba ontontn…õ nde k…ôf…ônc k…Ēn d…ôromp.

48.1: Nt…õ mes mam…Ēk…Ē mencep…ôr m…Ē, k'aŇčk…Ē paloku Isifu a Papa k…Ēn …õntamn…õ f…õ. K…Ē Isifu …õl…õk…õn…õ awut …Ēn m…õr…ôŇč Manase k…Ē ∆źfrayim.
48.2: K'as…ĒŇč…õ ti Yakuba k…ôc…ôr…õ, k'aloku k…Ē: ¬ęWan kam Isifu eyi k…ôder nn…Ē m…ôyi m…Ē.¬Ľ K…Ē Yakuba oloŇčka f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr f…Ēn k'…õy…õf…õ, k'…õnd…õ k…ôf…ônc k…Ēn k…ôroŇč.
48.3: K…Ē Yakuba oloku Isifu: ¬ęMARIKI nw…õ …õntam mes f…ôp ma doru m…Ē …õnawur…ôr im dare da Lus nde at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč k'…Ēs…ĒŇč im temer k…ôdepoc'em p…ôt…Ēt.
48.4: K'olok'im: ‚ÄĻIndes…ĒŇč …ôm dokomb…ôra, indes…ĒŇč'am k…ôla, indes…ĒŇč'am k…ôy…Ēn…õ w…ôtem ka afum alar…ôm. Indes…ĒŇč at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ yuruya yam k…Ē m…ôncep…ôr-…õ, at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ Ňčendey…Ēn…õ ŇčaŇčan doru o doru.‚Äļ¬Ľ
48.5: ¬ęNd…õk…ôl oŇč, awut m…õr…ôŇč aŇč…õ m…ôŇčkom at…Ēf Ňča Misira a k'indeder nn…Ē m…ôyi m…Ē, Ňčandey…Ēn…õ akemi. ∆źfrayim k…Ē Manase Ňčay…Ēn…õ akemi, p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē iy…Ē Ruben k…Ē Simey…ĒŇč m…Ē.
48.6: Mba awut aŇč…õ m…ôndekom oŇč aŇč…õ m…õr…ôŇč tadar…ôŇč m…Ē, akam Ňčandeyi akak…Ē, aw…õnc aŇča Ňč…Ē Ňčandes…Ēt…ôr k…õ.
48.7: K…ôder kem PadaŇč, k…Ē Ras…õl efir im d…Ēp…Ē da KanaŇč, ta p…ômb…Ēl…õ su k…ôb…õr…õ Efrata-…õ. Dif…Ē inawup k…Ē katina d…ôndo d…Ēp…Ē da Efrata, nde p…ôy…Ēn…õ Betl…õh…õm m…Ē.¬Ľ
48.8: K…Ē Yakuba …Ēm…Ēm…ôn awut a Isifu k'eyif: ¬ęAre Ňč…Ē akaŇč…õ-…õ?¬Ľ
48.9: K…Ē Isifu oloku papa k…Ēn: ¬ęAwut em Ňč…Ē, aŇč…õ Kanu k…ôs…ĒŇč im nn…Ē m…Ē.¬Ľ K…Ē Yakuba oloku: ¬ęIl…õts…õn'am m…ôy…Ē Ňča Ňčac…ĒŇčn…õ nn…Ē itolan…õ Ňča.¬Ľ
48.10: Detem d…õnal…Ēl…ôs Yakuba f…Ēr. ∆źnctam f…õ s…Ē k…ôn…ôŇčk. K…Ē Isifu …Ēnc…ĒŇč awut …Ēn nde Yakuba eyi m…Ē, k…Ē Yakuba oncup Ňča, k'…õmak…ôrn…õ Ňča.
48.11: K…Ē Yakuba oloku Isifu: ¬ęInac…õm-c…õm…ôn…õ f…õ s…Ē k…ôden…ôŇčk …ôm. Mba Kanu k…ôs…ĒŇč'em k'in…ôŇčk …ôm haŇč awut am!¬Ľ
48.12: K…Ē Isifu eliŇč awut kas d…ôl…ôŇčk, k'…õnc…ôp k…ôro d…ônt…Ēf.
48.13: K…Ē Isifu osump…ôr m…õr…ôŇč maŇčan f…ôp waca, p…ôsump…ôr…õ ∆źfrayim k…ôca k…ôt…Ēt mba p…ôyi k…ôca k…ômeriya ka Yakuba, k'osump…ôr…õ Manase k…ôca k…ômeriya mba p…ôyi Yakuba k…ôca k…ôt…Ēt, k'…Ēnc…ĒŇč…õn…õ Ňča s…Ē nde w…ôtem k…ôŇčan eyi m…Ē.

2.1: K…Ē w…ôrkun w…ôl…Ēma w…ôka kusuŇčka ka Lewy …õn…õnc…õ w…ôran w…ôl…Ēma nw…õ ŇčanapaŇčn…õ kusuŇčka kin k…Ē nk…Ēn m…Ē.

K'…õmb…õr wan k…ôfala nk…õ disr…õ, k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôc…ômb…ôr ki d…ôc…ôŇčk…Ēlma nde aparpara Ňča k…ôŇčgb…Ēk…Ē ka Nil.

4.6: K…Ē MARIKI oloku s…Ē Musa: ¬ęM…ôb…õr k…ôca duma tant…Ēf d…õb…ôk…ôc,¬Ľ k…Ē Musa …õmb…õr k…ôca k…Ēn duma tant…Ēf k'endeŇčn…õ d…õb…ôk…ôc. Nt…õ eliŇčn…õ ki m…Ē, ¬ęEh!¬Ľ, k…Ē sen s…ôsump…ôr k…Ē k…ôca k…Ē k…ôfer…õ, p…ôm…Ē nt…õ kibi k…ôntuf…ôr paka m…Ē.

4.10: K…Ē Musa oloku MARIKI: ¬ęM…ôŇčaŇčn…õ Mariki, mba fum nw…õ …Ēnt…Ēf…ôf…ôr…õn…õ temer m…Ē iy…Ēn…õ. Baf…Ē nendisna, baf…Ē nendecna, baf…Ē k…ôy…õf…õ nt…õ m…ônal…õk k…ôlok-lok…ôr ina, w…ôcar kam, a k'ilel…õ kusu k…Ē temer m…Ē. T…õs…ôkp…ôr f…õ. Bawo ilel…õ kusu k…Ē temer.¬Ľ

5.6: D…Ēs…Ēk din dad…Ēk…Ē d…Ē firawona osom ab…õ a dacar aMisira k…Ē abum aYisrayel, p…ôcloku:

5.10: K…Ē ab…õ a dacar k…Ē abum aYisrayel Ňčaloku afum: ¬ęNt…õ t…Ē firawona oloku: ‚ÄĻIf…Ēs…Ēs…ĒŇč nu m…õmp…ôl…õ!
5.11: N…ôk…Ē, n…ônas…ôrka n…ôt…õn m…õmp…ôl…õ nn…Ē o nn…Ē n…ôntam k…ôs…Ēt…Ē mi m…Ē, mba ali p…ôpic af…Ēdebeli y…õb…ôc yonu yeyeŇčki ny…õ p…ômar nu k…ôb…ôc m…Ē.‚Äļ¬Ľ

5.13: Ab…õ a dacar aMisira Ňčacgb…ôŇč-gb…ôŇč…ôr Ňča, Ňčacloku: ¬ęN…ôkuf…õ n…ôlip y…õb…ôc yonu ya d…Ēs…Ēk o d…Ēs…Ēk, p…ôm…Ē c…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē nt…õ m…õmp…ôl…õ mencyi m…Ē.¬Ľ
5.14: Ňäanak…Ē haŇč Ňčacsut abum aYisrayel aŇč…õ ab…õ a Misira aka firawona Ňčanac…ômb…ôr…õ aka Yisrayel m…Ē, Ňčacyif Ňča: ¬ęTa ake t…Ē n…ônt…Ēb…ôp…õ m…Ēk…Ē k…ôl…Ēm ka birik b…Ēk…Ē n…ôsutsa nendisna k…Ē nendecna m…Ē-…õ?¬Ľ

5.17: Mba k…Ē firawona oluks…õ Ňča: ¬ęN…ôna n…ôncemb…ôr, n…ôfan…õ! Ti t…Ē n…ôŇčlok…õn…õ: ‚ÄĻPaŇčk…Ēn loŇčn…õ MARIKI!‚Äļ

5.19: K…Ē abum aYisrayel Ňča s…Ē Ňčan…ôŇčk p…ôcuca p…Ēk…Ē Ňčayi m…Ē nt…õ aloku Ňča: ¬ęAf…Ēbeli k…ôl…Ēm ka birik b…Ēk…Ē ambonc…ôr nu k…ôsut d…Ēs…Ēk o d…Ēs…Ēk m…Ē!¬Ľ

17.8: D…ôndo k…ôfo kaŇčk…Ē ancwe Refidim m…Ē, dif…Ē aka Amal…õk Ňčander Ňčayekt…ôr aka Yisrayel k…ôwan.

18.1: Yetero, w…ôloŇčn…õ ka MadiyaŇč papa ka w…ôran ka Musa, ene mes m…Ēk…Ē Kanu k…ônay…Ēn…õ Musa k'aka Yisrayel afum …Ēn m…Ē, k'…õnc…ôr…õ t…Ēk…Ē MARIKI owur…õn…õ aka Yisrayel Misira m…Ē.

18.3: Musa …õnas…ĒŇč tewe ta K…õrs…Ēm coco c…Ēn, bawo …õnaloku: ¬ęW…ôcik…ôra iy…Ēn…õ nn…Ē at…Ēf Ňčocuru ŇčaŇč…õ.¬Ľ

18.10: K…Ē Yetero oloku: ¬ęIŇčkor-koru Kanu nk…õ k…ôbaŇč nu aka Misira k…Ē firawona d…ôwaca m…Ē, MARIKI nw…õ owur…õ nu dacar da aka Misira m…Ē!

18.13: D…Ēck…Ēs…Ēk, k…Ē Musa …õnd…õ k…ôboc kiti ka aka Yisrayel, k'aka Yisrayel Ňčac…ôm…õ Musa f…Ēr kiriŇč k…ôy…õf…õ b…ôtb…ôt haŇč d…Ēf…Ēy nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ Musa p…ôc…ôŇčk…ôl moloku maŇčan m…Ē.

18.19: Nd…õk…ôl oŇč m…ôc…ôŇčk…ôl dim dem m…ôwos…õ im…õŇčk…ôs …ôm nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ n…ôsol k…Ē Kanu m…Ē! Nt…õ p…ômar m…Ē, m…ôna m…ôy…Ēn…õ afum aka Yisrayel nn…Ē Kanu k…ôyi m…Ē, m…ôn'…Ē p…ômar m…ôcken…õ Kanu moloku ma k…ôgb…õk…ôl…õn…õ ma aka Yisrayel.

M…ôc…ômb…ôr afum wul o wul (1.000), afum am akak…Ē m…ôy…õk-y…õk m…Ē, w…ôkin p…ôy…Ēn…õ Ňča w…ôb…õ, w…ôl…Ēma w…ôb…õ w…ôka afum tasar tin (100), w…ôl…Ēma w…ôb…õ w…ôka afum w…ôco k…ôcam…ôt (50), w…ôl…Ēma w…ôb…õ w…ôka afum w…ôco.

P…ôy…Ēn…õ w…õs…õm, p…ôy…Ēn…õ fum, nw…õ o nw…õ oŇčgbuŇčn…õ pi m…Ē, w…ôkayi …Ēf…Ēyi s…Ē doru.‚Äļ T…õm nt…õ afula k…ôl…õn ka aŇčkesiya dim d…Ēp…ĒŇč m…Ē, afum ay…õk-y…õk Ňčandenatam k…ôp…õs…õ t…Ēr…Ē k…ôroŇč.¬Ľ

19.18: T…Ēr…Ē ta Sinayi f…ôp p…õncp…õ kinim…õ, bawo MARIKI …õnator di n…õnc disr…õ. Kinim…õ ka pi k…ôcp…õ p…ôm…Ē kinim…õ ka doco, k…Ē t…Ēr…Ē f…ôp p…õy…õf…õ k…ôyikc…õ p…ôp…ĒŇč.

25.2: ¬ęM…ôloku aka Yisrayel a ŇčabaŇč…ôs k…ôf…õk kem. N…ôbaŇč k…ôpoc…õ ka nw…õ o nw…õ …ĒŇčs…Ēk ab…ôk…ôc p…õs k…ôs…ĒŇč ki m…Ē.

25.4: c…ôloto c…ôgb…ôt kar…õ alom Ňča m…ôntamb…õnc, alom Ňčeyim Ňčeyimb…ôr…ôr, c…ôloto nc…õ andun…õ s…ôbeŇča sa kent…ôler k…Ē nc…õ andun…õ c…ôfon ca wir m…Ē,

Dif…Ē indek…Ē icsom …ôm m…õfaŇč mem f…ôp m…Ēk…Ē m…ônde m…ôcloku aka Yisrayel m…Ē.¬Ľ Am…õsa Ňča c…ôcom nc…õ aŇčs…ĒŇč Kanu m…Ē
25.23: ¬ęM…ôlomps…õ am…õsa k…ôt…Ēk ka kasiya. Dobolu da Ňči d…Ēy…Ē cururu m…õr…ôŇč, dowokulu da Ňči d…Ēy…Ē kururu katin, k…Ē deŇčeci da Ňči kururu katin k…Ē dac…Ē.

25.31: ¬ęM…ôde m…ôlomps…õ p…õd…õt…õ s…ôlamp k…õma k…ôt…õmp k…ôsoku p…õs. Pas…õl…ôr…õn…õ pi k…ôy…õf…õ ka p…õc…ôm…õn…õ k…ôk…Ē t…ômboŇčk pa pi, y…Ēn…Ēn…õ ya s…ôlamp, yogbuc ya pi, k…Ē yowur…õn…õ ya y…õl…õŇčk ya t…Ēk.

25.40: M…ôna Musa m…ôgb…ôtn…õ belbel, m…ôsur…õn…õ y…õb…ôc ny…õ m…ôm…Ēm…ôn nn…Ē t…Ēr…Ē k…ôroŇč m…Ē.¬Ľ

26.1: ¬ęMusa m…ôlomps…õ d…ôkiyi dosoku c…ôpol w…ôco ca k…ôloto ka s…ôbeŇča sa kent…ôler, ka alom Ňča m…ôntamb…õnc, alom Ňča bulu k'alom Ňčeyim. S…ôbeŇča sas…Ēk…Ē s…Ē m…ôŇčk…Ēdun…õ ci k…ôroŇč lulu ya m…õl…õk…õ kerub. Y…õb…ôc ya w…ôc…õr…ôŇč yendeyi yay…Ēk…Ē.

26.5: Dobol da c…ôloto cac…Ēk…Ē m…õr…ôŇč m…ôwes-wes…õ di s…ôbeŇča w…ôco k…ôcam…ôt (50), m…ônut yi, m…ôs…ĒŇč…õ yewes-wesi ya c…ôloto cac…Ēk…Ē m…õr…ôŇč f…ôp yosur…õn…õ d…õw…õnca.

26.10: M…ôde m…ôlomp…ôs yewes-wesi w…ôco k…ôcam…ôt (50) k…ôpol k…ôk…ôs…ôk ka y…õgb…õtl…õn…õ y…Ēc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē, m…ônut yi. K…ôpol k…ôk…ôs…ôk ka y…õgb…õtl…õn…õ ya m…õr…ôŇč s…Ē, m…ôlomp…ôs k…ôs…ôk kayi yewes-wesi w…ôco k…ôcam…ôt (50), m…ônut s…Ē yay…Ēk…Ē.
26.11: M…ôlomp…ôs Ňčkora w…ôco k…ôcam…ôt (50) ya k…Ēp…ôr ny…õ m…ôndegb…õk…ôr deyewes-wesi m…Ē, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ aŇčgbancan Ňč…Ēy…Ēn…õ Ňčin m…Ē.
26.12: Dac…Ē da c…ôpol ca c…ôloto dendecern…õ, paŇč…õr…õ di d…ôkiyi dosoku tadar…ôŇč.

27.1: ¬ęM…ôlomps…õ tetek toloŇčn…õ Kanu k…ôt…Ēk ka kasiya, dobolu da pi d…Ēy…Ē cururu k…ôcam…ôt, k…Ē dowokulu da pi s…Ē cururu k…ôcam…ôt. Tetek p…õt…ôŇčn…õn…õ c…ôs…ôk f…ôp, mba deŇčeci da pi d…Ēy…Ē cururu maas.

27.20: ¬ęK…Ē m…ôna Musa, m…ôsom aka Yisrayel Ňčak…õr'am moro m…Ēt…Ēt ma olif m…Ēf…Ēc, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ s…ôlamp s…ôctam k…ômar d…Ēf…Ēy o d…Ēf…Ēy m…Ē.

P…ômar s…ôlamp s…ôdek…Ē s…ôcmar MARIKI f…Ēr kiriŇč k…ôy…õf…õ d…Ēf…Ēy haŇč b…ôtb…ôt. Sariy…õ sa t…õm o t…õm s…Ē, p…ômar aka Yisrayel Ňčade Ňčaclel…ôs si d…õt…õmp k…Ē d…õt…õmp.¬Ľ

28.1: K…Ē MARIKI oloku Musa: ¬ęM…ôl…Ēt…ôrn…õn…õ aYisrayel dac…Ē nn…Ē m…ôyi m…Ē w…õnc …ôm Aruna, k'awut …Ēn arkun Nadab, Abihu, Elasar k…Ē Itamar. M…ôgb…õy Ňča k…Ē aka Yisrayel alp…ôs aŇč…õ, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ Ňčay…Ēn'em aloŇčn…õ m…Ē.
28.2: M…ôlomps…õ w…õnc …ôm Aruna yamos ya d…ôKanu, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ yede yecment…ôr d…ôk…ôc…ôm…õ k…Ē delel d…Ēn m…Ē.
28.3: M…ôlok-lok…ôr ac…õr…ôŇč f…ôp, ak…Ē ilas kifir ka d…õc…õr…ôŇč m…Ē: Ňäa Ňčandelomps…õ Aruna yamos, ny…õ endeb…õrn…õ k'ande pacs…Ēk…ôs k…Ē-…õ, a padey…Ēn…õ oŇč w…ôloŇčn…õ kem.

28.6: ¬ęAc…õr…ôŇč Ňčadun…õ duma da ef…Ēd k…ôloto ka s…ôbeŇča sa kent…ôler, sa alom Ňča m…ôntamb…õnc, alom Ňča bulu k…Ē Ňčeyim k…Ē s…ôbeŇča sa k…õma.

28.9: M…ôl…õk s…Ē walak…õ wa masar m…Ēt…Ēt ma onik…ôs m…õr…ôŇč nw…õ m…ôndecic mewe ma awut a Yakuba m…Ē.
28.10: Pacic mewe cam…ôt-tin tasar t…Ēc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē k…ôroŇč, k…Ē mewe m…õlp…ôs m…Ēk…Ē cam…ôt-tin s…Ē tasar ta m…õr…ôŇč t…Ēk…Ē k…ôroŇč, t…Ēk…Ē Ňčamb…õk…õn…õ m…Ē.

28.12: M…ôde m…ôs…Ēt…ôr…õn…õ masar mam…Ēk…Ē m…õr…ôŇč yeyes…õ banca ya duma da ef…Ēd k…ôroŇč, t…Ēy…Ēn…õ t…õc…õmc…õm…ôs ta awut a Yisrayel (Yakuba). Ti disr…õ Aruna ende p…ôcd…õt…ôrn…õ mewe mam…Ēk…Ē d…ôbanca f…Ēr ya ina MARIKI kiriŇč nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ icc…õm-c…õmn…õ nu t…õm f…ôp m…Ē.
28.14: m…ôdu megbekce m…õr…ôŇč p…ôm…Ē k…ôb…ônda yay…Ēk…Ē s…Ē k…õma k…ôsoku p…õs, ny…õ andek…Ēd…õt…ôr f…ôr…õm faf…Ēk…Ē m…Ē.¬Ľ Yuba ya kiti ny…õ w…ôloŇčn…õ w…ôp…ĒŇč …õŇčgb…õkn…õ m…Ē
28.15: ¬ęM…ôlomp…ôs yuba ya kiti y…õgb…õkn…õ d…õb…ôk…ôc, pas…Ēt…õ yi k…ôloto ka s…ôbeŇča sa kent…ôler, s…ôbeŇča sa k…õma, s…ôbeŇča sa alom Ňča m…ôntamb…õnc, alom Ňča bulu, alom Ňčeyim p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē alomp…ôs duma da ef…Ēd m…Ē. Y…õb…ôc ya w…ôc…õr…ôŇč yendeyi yay…Ēk…Ē.
28.16: Panut ki k…ôm…õr…ôŇč, k…ôs…ôk o k…ôs…ôk k…ôy…Ē dobolu da k…ôca disr…õ katin.

28.18: K…ôgba ka m…õr…ôŇč k…ôy…Ē masar momot…ôr-mot…ôr mm…õ: Tasar teyim ceŇč, tasar t'alom Ňča bulu k…Ē diyamaŇč.

36.8: Afum ac…õr…ôŇč aŇč…õ Ňčancb…ôc m…Ē f…ôp, Ňčalomps…õ d…ôkiyi dosoku c…ôpol w…ôco ca s…ôbeŇča sa kent…ôler, alom Ňča m…ôntamb…õnc, alom Ňča bulu, k'alom Ňčeyim, padu ci k…ôroŇč lulu ya m…õl…õk…õ kerub, y…õb…ôc ya ac…õr…ôŇč y…õnayi.

36.17: K'olomp…ôs yewes-wesi w…ôco k…ôcam…ôt (50) k…ôpol k…ôk…ôs…ôk ka y…õgb…õtl…õn…õ y…Ēc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē, k'onut yi. K…ôpol k…ôk…ôs…ôk ka y…õgb…õtl…õn…õ ya m…õr…ôŇč y…Ēk…Ē k'olomp…ôs yewes-wesi w…ôco k…ôcam…ôt (50), k'onut s…Ē yay…Ēk…Ē.

36.21: Dobolu da f…ôr…õm o f…ôr…õm d…õnay…Ē cururu w…ôco k…Ē dowokulu da fi kururu katin k…Ē dac…Ē.

37.8: M…ôs…õl…ôr…õn…õ m…õl…õk…õ kerub min d…ôk…ôcop da af…õŇčk k…ôroŇč, m…õl…õk…õ kerub m…õr…ôŇč m…Ēk…Ē d…ôk…ôl…ôps…ôr da Ňči k…ôroŇč. K'olomp…ôs m…õl…õk…õ kerub m…õr…ôŇč k…Ē af…õŇčk Ňč…Ēs…Ēks…õ kiciya, k…Ē y…Ēy…Ēn…õ paka pin nde d…ôk…ôcop k…Ē d…ôk…ôl…ôps…ôr da Ňči k…ôroŇč.

37.10: K…Ē Betsalel olomps…õ am…õsa k…ôt…Ēk ka kasiya. Dobolu da am…õsa ŇčaŇč…Ēk…Ē d…õnay…Ē cururu m…õr…ôŇč, k…Ē dowokulu da Ňči d…õnay…Ē kururu katin, k…Ē deŇčeci da Ňči kururu katin k…Ē dac…Ē.
37.11: K'osop Ňči k…õma k…ôsoku p…õs, k'olomp…ôs Ňči k…ôb…ôr ka k…õma haŇč k'…Ēn…ĒŇčk…ôr.

37.17: K…Ē Betsalel olomps…õ p…õd…õt…õ s…ôlamp k…õma k…ôt…õmp k…ôsoku p…õs, k'…õs…õl…ôr…õn…õ k…ôy…õf…õ p…õc…ôm…õn…õ, k…ôk…Ē t…ômboŇčk pa pi, y…Ēn…Ēn…õ ya s…ôlamp, yogbuc ya pi, k…Ē yowur…õn…õ ya y…õl…õŇčk ya t…Ēk.

37.23: K'olomp…ôs s…ôlamp cam…ôt-m…õr…ôŇč, macaŇčk k…Ē map m…õkay…õ meken. K'olomps…õ f…ôp fa mi k…õma k…ôsoku p…õs.
37.24: K…õma k…ôsoku p…õs kilo w…ôco maas (30) k'…õnalomps…õ p…õd…õt…õ s…ôlamp k…Ē yosump…ôr-sump…ôr ya pi. Tetek p…Ēc…Ēf…õ pa suray
37.25: K…Ē Betsalel olomps…õ tetek p…Ēc…Ēf…õ MARIKI suray k…ôt…Ēk ka kasiya. Dobolu da tetek pap…Ēk…Ē d…õnay…Ē kururu katin, k…Ē dowokulu da pi kururu katin, p…ônat…ôŇčn…õ c…ôs…ôk f…ôp, k…Ē deŇčeci da pi cururu m…õr…ôŇč. Tetek k…Ē l…õn ya pi y…õt…ôp…ôr…õn…õ anas…õl…ôr…õn…õ y…Ēy…Ēn…õ paka pin.

2.7: Bawo MARIKI Kanu kam k…ômpoc'am p…ôt…Ēt d…ômosump…ôr ma waca wam f…ôp, Kanu k…ônac…ôr…õ k…ôk…Ēt kam t…õgb…ôr…õ p…Ēp…ĒŇč pamp…õ. Meren w…ôco maŇčk…ôl…õ (40) m…Ē mam…õ MARIKI Kanu kam k…ôsol'am, ali paka pombut f'am.¬Ľ

2.26: Inasak asom k…ôy…õf…õ ka nde t…õgb…ôr…õ ta Kedemot, k…ôk…Ē ka nda Sih…ĒŇč w…ôb…õ ka Hesbon, k…ôk…Ēloku k…Ē moloku ma k…ôt…ôŇčn…õ:

22.16: ¬ęNt…õ t…Ē k…ôloŇčkan…õ ka afum a Mariki f…ôp Ňčaloku: Ake d…õtaŇči l…ôŇč…ôs d…Ē n…ôy…Ē Kanu ka aka Yisrayel tant…õ-…õ? N…ôlukus m…Ēk…Ē Mariki dar…ôŇč nt…õ n…ônc…ômb…ôr tetek toloŇčn…õ Kanu, n…ôyeŇčk…ôr m…Ēk…Ē Mariki domp!

22.18: K…Ē n…ôna n…ôŇčyeŇčk m…Ēk…Ē k…ôlukus dim da MARIKI dar…ôŇč! K…Ē n…ôyeŇčk…ôr m…Ēk…Ē MARIKI domp-…õ, alna aka Yisrayel f…ôp Ňč…Ē endewur…ôr m…õt…õl…õ mam…Ēk…Ē.
22.19: K…Ē t…Ēy…Ēn…õ at…Ēf nŇč…õ Ňč…Ēy…Ēn…õ Ňčonu m…Ē, Ňč…Ēs…Ēk f…õ-…õ, n…ôcep…ôr oŇč at…Ēf nŇč…õ Ňč…Ēy…Ēn…õ Ňča Mariki m…Ē, nde Mariki eyi m…Ē, t…õm tat…Ēk…Ē n…ônd…õ su dac…Ē, mba ta n…ôyeŇčk…ôr Mariki s…ôbomp, ta n…ôyeŇčk…ôr s…ôna s…Ē s…ôbomp k…ôc…ôr…õ a n…ôc…ômb…ôr tetek toloŇčn…õ p…Ēl…Ēma mp…õ p…Ēnt…Ēy…Ēn…õ tetek toloŇč…õ pa Mariki, Kanu kosu m…Ē.
22.20: Nt…õ AkaŇč wan ka Sera …õnalukus k…ôc…ôm…õ Kanu dar…ôŇč teta ca c…ôk…Ē MARIKI k…ônam…Ēn…õ k…ôl…õk m…Ē, aka Yisrayel f…ôp Ňč…Ē MARIKI k…ônawur…ôr m…õt…õl…õ m…Ēn. N…ônc…ôr…õ ti belbel a baf…Ē AkaŇč sona …õnafin…õ kiciya kaŇčk…Ē.¬Ľ
22.21: K…Ē afum a Ruben, Kadu, k…Ē aka kusuŇčka dac…Ē ka Manase Ňčaloku ab…õ akiriŇč aka cor ca Yisrayel:
22.22: ¬ęKanu ka canu, MARIKI! Kanu ka canu, MARIKI, Ki k…ônc…ôr…õ ti! Aka Yisrayel Ňčandec…ôr…õ ti! K…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ f…Ē k…ôt…Ē-c…ôŇčk…ôl k…Ē k…ôyeŇčk…ôr domp k…Ē-…õ, ta p…ôdeyac su d…Ēs…Ēk dad…Ēk…Ē!
22.23: K…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ a s…ônc…ômb…ôr tetek toloŇčn…õ posu teta k…ôdegb…õk…ôl Mariki-…õ, k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ s…ônde s…ôcloŇčn…õ di yoloŇčn…õ y…Ēc…Ēf-…õ, k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ f…õ ti yoloŇčn…õ ya yokom ya y…Ēb…Ēf, k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ a yoloŇčn…õ ya p…ôforu-…õ, awa, Mariki endegb…õk…ôr…õ ti!
22.24: Baf…Ē it…Ē teyi! S…ôlomp…ôs tetek toloŇčn…õ Kanu pamp…õ bawo s…ônes…õ ta alna awut anu Ňčade Ňčacyif akosu f…Ē: ‚ÄĻAk'eyi nu dac…Ē k…Ē MARIKI, Kanu ka Yisrayel-…õ?
22.25: MARIKI k…ômboc k…ôl…ônc…ôr Yurd…õn n…ôna k…Ē s…ôna dac…Ē, aRuben, k…Ē aKadu, ali tes teyi f'on s…Ē dac…Ē k…Ē MARIKI!‚Äļ Teta awut anu tendes…ĒŇč…õ ta awut asu ŇčaŇčnes…õ s…Ē MARIKI-…õ.
22.26: It…Ē s…ônc…õm-c…õmn…õ a: S…ômar…õn…õ s…ôc…ômb…ôr tetek toloŇčn…õ, baf…Ē s…ôde s…ôcloŇčn…õ di y…Ēc…Ēl y…Ēc…Ēf k…Ē k…ôloŇčn…õ k…ôl…Ēma de,
22.27: mba Ňčeyi su dac…Ē k…Ē n…ôna p…ôm…Ē sede. Ňäeyi s…Ē awut asu dac…Ē k…Ē awut anu ŇčacloŇčn…õ yoloŇčn…õ ya y…Ēc…Ēf k…Ē yoloŇčn…õ ya p…ôforu MARIKI f…Ēr y…Ēn kiriŇč, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ ta Ňčade Ňčacloku d…Ēs…Ēk d…Ēl…Ēma a t…Ēl…Ēm o t…Ēl…Ēm teyi f…õ awut asu dac…Ē k…Ē MARIKI!
22.28: K…Ē s…ôloku: ‚ÄĻK…Ē Ňčande Ňčaloku su tant…õ, k…Ē p…ôy…Ē f…õ ti Ňčaloku awut asu ti-…õ, moloku mam…õ m…Ē s…ôndeluks…õ Ňča: ¬ęN…ôgb…ôtn…õ teyi ta tetek toloŇčn…õ Mariki mp…õ atem asu Ňčanac…ômb…ôr m…Ē, baf…Ē teta k…ôloŇčn…õ ka y…Ēc…Ēl y…Ēc…Ēf k…Ē k…ôloŇčn…õ ka yokom y…Ēb…Ēf y…Ēl…Ēma t…Ē anac…ômb…ôr…õ Ňči de, mba Ňč…Ēy…Ēn…õ sede su dac…Ē k…Ē n…ôna Ňč…õcc…õm-c…õm…ôs su.¬Ľ‚Äļ
22.29: S…ômb…Ēl…õn…õ k…ôyeŇčk…ôr Mariki s…ôbomp, tes o tes doru dand…õ t…Ēf…Ēs…ĒŇč…õ su m…Ēk…Ē k…ôlukus k…Ē dar…ôŇč, k…ôc…ômb…ôr kosu tetek toloŇčn…õ p…Ēc…Ēl p…Ēc…Ēf k…ôloŇčn…õ yokom y…Ēb…Ēf k…Ē k…ôloŇčn…õ k…ôl…Ēma, s…ôf…ĒloŇčn…õ k…ôfo k…ôcuru ta p…ôy…Ēn…õ nde tetek toloŇčn…õ Mariki Kanu kosu nw…õ eyi tekiriŇč ta k…ôfo nk…õ as…Ēk…ôs m…Ē!
22.30: Nt…õ w…ôloŇčn…õ Pinahas, k…Ē ab…õ akiriŇč a k…ôloŇčkan…õ k…Ē abeki a cor ca Yisrayel aŇč…õ Ňčanayi di Ňčane moloku mam…Ēk…Ē afum a Ruben, Kadu, k…Ē kusuŇčka dac…Ē ka Manase Ňčanaloku m…Ē, k…Ē moloku mam…Ēk…Ē m…Ēmb…Ēt Ňča.
22.31: K…Ē Pinahas wan ka w…ôloŇčn…õ Elasar oloku afum a Ruben, Kadu, k…Ē afum a Manase: ¬ęS…ônc…ôr…õ m…Ēk…Ē a MARIKI k…ôyi su dac…Ē, bawo n…ôntalukus f…õ k…ôc…ôm…õ MARIKI dar…ôŇč, k…Ē n…ôyac s…Ē aka Yisrayel ta MARIKI k…ôboc Ňča kiti.¬Ľ
22.32: K…Ē Pinahas wan ka w…ôloŇčn…õ Elasar k…Ē akiriŇč a cor c…ôŇčan Ňčalukus k…ôy…õf…õ ndena afum a Ruben k…Ē Kadu nde at…Ēf Ňča Kaladu k…ôk…Ē nde ant…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč ndena aka Yisrayel aŇč…õ Ňčanak…Ē Ňčaluks…õ moloku m…Ēk…Ē Ňčanas…Ēt…ôr Ňča m…Ē.
22.33: K…Ē moloku mam…Ēk…Ē m…Ēmb…Ēt aka Yisrayel, k…Ē ŇčaŇčkor-koru Kanu. Ňäaloku f…õ s…Ē k…ôk…Ēm…ôl…ôk ant…Ēf nŇč…õ afum a Ruben k…Ē afum a Kadu Ňčanand…õ m…Ē.
22.34: Afum a Ruben k…Ē afum a Kadu Ňčas…ĒŇč tetek toloŇčn…õ Kanu pap…Ēk…Ē tewe, Ňčacloku: ¬ęT…Ēy…Ēn…õ su sede a Mariki …Ēy…Ēn…õ Kanu.¬Ľ

23.1: T…õm tobolu-bolu t…õnacep…ôr k…ôy…õf…õ ka nt…õ MARIKI k…ônas…ĒŇč aka Yisrayel k…ôŇčes…ôm m…Ē, k…ôb…õr Ňča ater…õn…õ aŇčan ac…ôs…ôk f…ôp d…ôwaca. Yosuwe …õnasik…ôr oŇč t…õm tat…Ēk…Ē.
23.2: K…Ē Yosuwe ewe aka Yisrayel f…ôp k…ôy…õf…õ abeki, ab…õ af…õt d…ôcor d…ôcor, aboc kiti, k…ôb…ôp ka ab…õ akiriŇč aŇčan, k'oloku Ňča: ¬ęIy…Ēn…õ oŇč w…ôtem.
23.3: K…Ē n…ôn…ôŇčk t…Ēk…Ē MARIKI Kanu konu k…ônay…Ē afum aka t…Ēf ny…õ f…ôp m…Ē te tonu, bawo MARIKI k…ôsutn…õn'on.
23.4: N…ôn…ôŇčk nt…õ iŇčkot yampuŇč-puŇč a k'iyer un t…Ēf ya k…õ konu d…ôcusuŇčka d…ôcusuŇčka m…Ē, t…Ēf ny…õ y…õnc…ôm…õ k…ôbaŇč Yurd…õn ntende dec d…õŇčkal…õ m…Ē, k…Ē t…Ēf ny…õ inim haŇč nde K…ôba K…ôp…ĒŇč m…Ē.

23.6: N…ôwur…õ f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr, n…ôsump…ôr n…ôlel…ôs moloku mm…õ acic…ôs buk ba sariy…õ sa Musa m…Ē, ta n…ôgbaym…õ k…ôca k…ômeriya, ta n…ôgbaym…õ k…ôca k…ôt…Ēt,
23.7: ta n…ôden…ĒŇčk…ôl…õn…õ afum a t…Ēf akak…Ē Ňčayi nu dac…Ē m…Ē! Ta n…ôbonc canu c…ôŇčan, ta n…ôkorn…õ ci k…ôd…õr…ôm. Ta n…ôkor-koru ci, ta n…ôtontn…õ ci f…Ēr kiriŇč!
23.8: Mba n…ôsump…ôr MARIKI Kanu konu p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē n…ônal…õk ti k…ôy…Ē haŇč m…Ēk…Ē m…Ē.
23.9: MARIKI k…ômbaŇč…ôr t…Ēf y…Ēp…ĒŇč aka f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr, ali fum …õntatam f…õ haŇč m…Ēk…Ē k…ôc…ôm…õ konu f…Ēr kiriŇč.
23.10: N…ôna fum w…ôkin gboŇč …õncb…õl…ôs ater…õn…õ anu p…õc…ôp pin, bawo MARIKI Kanu konu k…ôncsutn…õn'on, p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē k…ônalok'un m…Ē.
23.12: K…Ē n…ôlukus MARIKI dar…ôŇč-…õ, k…Ē n…ôc…ôm…õ afum acuru aŇč…õ Ňčayi nu dac…Ē m…Ē dar…ôŇč-…õ, k…Ē n…ôn…õnc…õn…õ-…õ, k…Ē n…ôn…ĒŇčk…ôl…õn…õ-…õ,
23.13: n…ôc…ôr…õ a MARIKI Kanu konu k…ôf…Ēdec…ôm…õ s…Ē k…ôbaŇčs…ôr Ňča afum akak…Ē t…Ēf yaŇčan f…Ēr yonu kiriŇč, mba afum akak…Ē Ňčandey…Ēn'on mowul, m…õn…ômp, yala, c…ôŇčgban-gban ca c…ôs…ôk conu, k…Ē gb…õc d…ôf…Ēr yonu, haŇč n…ôlip k…ôm…ôlk…õ at…Ēf Ňčobotu ŇčaŇč…õ MARIKI Kanu konu k…ôs…ĒŇč'un m…Ē.
23.14: ¬ęAwa, n…ôc…ôŇčk…ôl im! M…Ēk…Ē t…õm t…õmb…ôp k…ôk…Ē ka nde ca ca doru f…ôp yendek…Ē m…Ē. N…ôc…ôr…õ ti b…ôk…ôc yonu yosoku p…õs, a moloku mobotu mm…õ MARIKI Kanu konu k…ônalok'un m…Ē, ali tin teyi f…õ nt…õ …Ēnt…Ēy…Ēn'on m…Ē, ali tin teyi f…õ nt…õ …Ēnt…Ēlas m…Ē.
23.15: MARIKI k…ôlas k…ôy…Ēn…õ ka p…ôt…Ēt p…Ēk…Ē …õnaloku k…ôy…Ēn'on m…Ē, mba …õntam s…Ē k…ôlas ka p…ôl…õc p…Ēk…Ē eyi k…ôn…õps'on m…Ē, p…ôm…ôl…ôk un ant…Ēf Ňčobotu ŇčaŇč…õ …Ēs…ĒŇč'un m…Ē.
23.16: K…Ē n…ôsak m…õt…ôŇčn…õ mosu mm…õ MARIKI k…ônd…ôŇčk'on m…Ē-…õ, k…Ē n…ôŇčk…Ē n…ôcloŇčn…õ canu c…ôl…Ēma-…õ, k…Ē n…ôŇčk…Ē n…ôctontn…õ canu c…ôl…Ēma f…Ēr kiriŇč-…õ, ab…ôk…ôc Ňča MARIKI Ňč…õmp…õ nn…Ē n…ôyi m…Ē. T…õm tat…Ēk…Ē n…ôŇčm…ôlk…õ ant…Ēf Ňčobotu ŇčaŇč…õ MARIKI k…ôs…ĒŇč'un m…Ē, n…ôlip.

24.1: K…Ē Yosuwe oloŇčka cusuŇčka ca Yisrayel f…ôp S…õk…õm. K'ewen…õn…õ s…Ē abeki a Yisrayel, ab…õ aŇčan, aboc aŇčan kiti, k…Ē akiriŇč aŇčan, k…Ē Ňčament…ôrn…õ nn…Ē Kanu k…ôyi m…Ē.

24.4: K'is…ĒŇč Siyaka awut: Yakuba k…Ē Esayu. K'is…ĒŇč Esayu m…Ēr…Ē ma Seyir nt…õ t…Ēy…Ēn…õ ant…Ēf Ňč…Ēn, k…Ē Yakuba k…Ē awut …Ēn Ňča Ňčantor Misira.

24.7: Nt…õ awisi aŇča Ňčawes-wes k…ômar ka MARIKI m…Ē, k…Ē k…ôntor…õ kubump k…ôp…ĒŇč aka Misira k…Ē n…ôna dac…Ē. K…Ē Kanu k…ôŇčgb…ôt…ôs Ňča d…ôk…ôba. N…ônat…ôŇčn…õ mes mm…õ inay…Ē Misira m…Ē f…Ēr yonu kiriŇč. K…Ē n…ôwon k…ônd…õ d…ôt…õgb…ôr…õ meren m…õlar…ôm.
24.8: T…õm tat…Ēk…Ē t'inakek…ôr'on ant…Ēf Ňča aka Am…Ēr aŇč…õ Ňčanand…õ Yurd…õn k…ôs…ôk ntende dec d…õmp…õ m…Ē. K…Ē n…ôsut…õn…õ k…Ē Ňča, mba k'il…õk aka Am…Ēr k'imb…õr'un Ňča d…ôwaca. K…Ē n…ômbaŇč…ôr Ňča ant…Ēf ŇčaŇčan, k'im…ôl…ôk Ňča f…Ēr yonu kiriŇč.
24.9: K…Ē Balak wan w…ôka Sip…Ēr w…ôb…õ w…ôka Mohab …õw…õk…ôrn…õ aka Yisrayel. K'osom Balam wan w…ôka Bey…Ēr a p…ôtolan'on p…ôl…õc,
24.10: mba k'ifati k…ôc…ôŇčk…ôl k…Ē. P…ôt…Ēt gb…ôc…ôr…ôm p…Ē Balam onctolan'on, k'iyac nu f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr f…Ēn.
24.11: K…Ē n…ôncali k…ôŇčgb…Ēk…Ē ka Yurd…õn, k…Ē n…ônder Yeriko. K…Ē aka Yeriko k…ôl…õk…õn…õ aka Am…Ēr, aPerisi, aKanaŇč, aHit, aKirkasa, aHiwy, k…Ē aYebus Ňčasut…õn…õ k…Ē n…ôna, k'il…õk Ňča k'imb…õr'un d…ôwaca.
24.12: K'isom deme nd…õ d…õnayi nu kiriŇč k…Ē d…õmb…õl…ôs ab…õ a Am…Ēr m…õr…ôŇč m…Ē. In'…õnas…ĒŇč on k…ôtam Ňča. Baf…Ē sakma sonu, baf…Ē mb…ônc…ôran yonu y…Ē n…ônatam…õ ater…õn…õ anu de!
24.13: In'…Ēs…ĒŇč un ant…Ēf nŇč…õ n…ônt…Ēb…ôc haŇč n…ôtaka m…Ē, k…Ē n…ônd…õ s…ôdare ns…õ n…ônt…Ēc…ômb…ôr…õ waca wonu m…Ē. K…Ē n…ôndi yeri ya dal…õ nd…õ n…ônt…Ēbifti m…Ē, n…ôcdi yokom ya t…Ēk ny…õ n…ônt…Ēb…Ēf m…Ē.‚Äļ

24.15: K…Ē n…ônt…Ēwos…õ oŇč k…ôkorn…õ MARIKI-…õ, n…ôbonc m…Ēk…Ē an…Ē n…ônde n…ôckorn…õ-…õ, k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ canu nc…õ atem anu Ňčanckorn…õ ntende ∆źf…ôrat k…ôca ka ntende dec d…õmp…õ m…Ē, k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ f…õ ti-…õ, canu ca aka Am…Ēr aŇč…õ n…ôyi k…ônd…õ ant…Ēf ŇčaŇčan m…Ē. Mba ina k…Ē aka k…ôl…Ē kem disr…õ MARIKI k…Ē s…ônde s…ôckorn…õ!¬Ľ
24.16: K…Ē afum Ňčaluks…õ k…Ē: ¬ęS…ômb…Ēl…õn…õ k…ôsak MARIKI a s…ôckorn…õ canu c…ôl…Ēma! S…ôf…Ētam k…ôy…Ē tat…Ēk…Ē!

3.5: K…Ē Rut oloku k…Ēnc…ôra k…Ēn: ¬ęIŇčk…Ēy…Ē tant…õ m…ôlok'im m…Ē f…ôp.¬Ľ
3.6: K…Ē Rut …ĒŇčk…Ē nde d…ôkur, k'…Ēy…Ē t…Ēk…Ē k…Ēnc…ôra k…Ēn …õnaloku k…Ē m…Ē f…ôp.

3.10: K…Ē B…Ēs oloku: ¬ęMARIKI p…ôpoc'am p…ôt…Ēt wan kem w…ôran! M…ôment…ôr s…Ē n…Ēn…Ēf…Ēr nn…Ē akom…õn…õ a k…Ēnc…ôra kam Ňčayi m…Ē p…ôtas d…Ēk…Ē m…ônament…ôr t…Ēc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē m…Ē. Bawo m…ônc…ôm…õ f…õ at…õmp dar…ôŇč Ňčay…Ē daka, Ňčay…Ē f…õ daka.

3.13: M…ôcep…ôr…õn…õ nn…Ē pibi. B…ôtb…ôtana, k'…õfaŇč k…ôl…õk k…ôc…ôm'am d…ônt…Ēf-…õ, tentes…õ, p…ôc…ôm'am d…ônt…Ēf. Mba k'…Ēnt…ĒfaŇč k…ôc…ôm'am d…ônt…Ēf-…õ, ina inc…ôm'am d…ônt…Ēf, k…Ē MARIKI owos…õ-…õ! M…ôf…ônt…ôr…õ haŇč dec d…Ēcs…Ēk.¬Ľ

3.15: K…Ē B…Ēs oloku k…Ē: ¬ęM…ôcipi k…ôfak…ôl nk…õ m…ônc…ôpn…õ m…Ē, m…ôsump…ôr ki belbel.¬Ľ K…Ē Rut osump…ôr k…ôfak…ôl, k…Ē B…Ēs …õmb…õr…õ k…Ē m…õŇčgb…õn ma …Ērs tafala cam…ôt-tin, k'onuŇčk…ôr k…Ē, k…Ē B…Ēs …ĒŇčk…Ē dare.
3.16: K…Ē Rut …ĒŇčk…Ē ndena k…Ēnc…ôra k…Ēn Noyemi. K…Ē w…ôkak…Ē eyif k…Ē: ¬ęC…ôke c…Ē tencep…ôrna-…õ, wan kem w…ôran?¬Ľ K…Ē Rut …Ēl…Ēm…ôr k…Ēnc…ôra k…Ēn mes m…Ēk…Ē w…ôrkun nw…õ …õnay…Ēn…õ k…Ē m…Ē f…ôp.
3.17: K…Ē Rut oloku: ¬ę∆Üs…ĒŇč im …Ērs k…ôfala cam…ôt-tin, p…ôcloku: ‚ÄĻTa m…ôlukus waca w…Ēs…Ēk…ôr ndena k…Ēnc…ôra kam!‚Äļ¬Ľ
3.18: K…Ē Noyemi oloku Rut: ¬ęM…ôyi nn…Ē, wan kem w…ôran, haŇč m…ôcc…ôr…õ t…Ēk…Ē mes mam…õ mendel…ôps…ôr m…Ē, bawo w…ôrkun w…ôkaw…õ, …Ēf…Ēs…Ētam k…ônd…õ k'…Ēnt…Ēlip mes mam…õ m…Ēk…Ē-…õ!¬Ľ

4.1: K…Ē B…Ēs …ĒŇčk…Ē d…ôk…ôb…õr…õ da dare daŇčan k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ônd…õ. P…ôwon f…õ, Elim…õl…õk w…ôkom…õn…õ w…ôk…Ē B…Ēs …õnaloku a w…ôkak…Ē …õnaŇčkan…õ k…ôl…Ēt…ôrn…õ k…ôc…ôm…õ ka Rut d…ônt…Ēf p…ôtas k…Ē m…Ē, k…Ē w…ôrkun nw…õ encep…ôr, k…Ē B…Ēs ewe k…Ē: ¬ęM…ôc…ĒŇčn…õ m…ôde m…ônd…õ nn…Ē!¬Ľ K…Ē w…ôkak…Ē …Ēnc…ĒŇčn…õ k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ônd…õ.
4.2: K…Ē B…Ēs …õl…õk afum abeki w…ôco dare disr…õ, k'oloku Ňča: ¬ęN…ônd…õ nn…Ē!¬Ľ K…Ē akak…Ē Ňčand…õ.
4.3: K…Ē B…Ēs oloku w…ôk…Ē p…ônamar a p…ôc…ôm…õ Rut d…ônt…Ēf m…Ē: ¬ęNt…õ Noyemi …õy…õf…õ at…Ēf Ňča Mohab, k'…õfaŇč k…ôcam…ôs tofok…ôl ta ant…Ēf Ňč…Ēk…Ē Ňč…õnay…Ēn…õ Ňča w…õnc kosu Elim…õl…õk m…Ē.

K…Ē m…ônt…Ēs…ĒfaŇč di-…õ, m…ôs…ĒŇč'em ti k…ôc…ôr…õ, bawo sariy…õ sa k…õ kaŇčk…õ, k…Ē m…ôna m…ôy…õf…õ day-…õ, in'…Ē p…ômar ic…ôm…õ.¬Ľ K…Ē w…ôrkun nw…õ oloku B…Ēs: ¬ęIfaŇč k…ôway dal…õ dad…Ēk…Ē yati.¬Ľ
4.5: K…Ē B…Ēs endeŇč…ôr: ¬ęK…Ē m…ôway dal…õ Noyemi d…ôwaca-…õ, m…õn…õ m…ônas…ôr s…Ē Rut w…ôMohab, w…ôran ka w…ôfi. Nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ ta tewe ta w…ôfi t…Ēs…Ēl…õ k…õ kaŇčk…õ k…ôroŇč m…Ē.¬Ľ
4.6: K…Ē w…ôrkun nw…õ oloku: ¬ęK…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ tat…Ēk…Ē t…Ē-…õ, if…Ētam k…ôway k…õ nk…õ ta ideyam…ôs teta daka dem nd…õ iy…Ē m…Ē. M…ôl…õk sariy…õ sem sa k…ôwurus, bawo if…Ētam ina w…ôs…ôrka k…ôk…Ēt…õn…õ ti.¬Ľ
4.7: Awa, c…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē at…Ēf Ňča Yisrayel, k…Ē afum ŇčandecaŇč…ôs k…ôway k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ f…õ ti Ňčas…ôkp…ôr…õn…õ daka d…Ēl…Ēma-…õ, w…ôkin oŇčwur…õ k…Ēfta k…Ēn p…ôs…ĒŇč ki w…ôk…Ē Ňčayi k…ôlomp…ôs mes m…Ē. T…Ēy…Ē tat…Ēk…Ē t…õnay…Ēn…õ t…õcaŇčs…õ moloku c…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē at…Ēf Ňča Yisrayel.
4.8: K…Ē w…ôrkun nw…õ p…ônamar k…ôway dal…õ nd…õ m…Ē, oloku B…Ēs: ¬ęB…Ēs, m…ôna m…ôway!¬Ľ K…Ē w…ôrkun nw…õ owur…õ k…Ēfta k…Ēn, k'…Ēs…ĒŇč ki B…Ēs.

MARIKI p…ôs…ĒŇč…õ w…ôran w…ôkaw…õ m…ôyi k…ônas…ôr m…Ē p…ôyi p…ôm…Ē Leya k…Ē Ras…õl, aran aŇč…õ m…õr…ôŇč aŇč…õ ŇčaŇčkom afum aka at…Ēf Ňča Yisrayel m…Ē! Kanu k…ôs…ĒŇč …ôm s…Ēk…ôt aka kusuŇčka ka ∆źf…ôrat dac…Ē, m…ôs…Ēt…Ē tewe nde Bet L…õh…õm!
4.12: MARIKI p…ôs…ĒŇč …ôm k…Ē w…ôran w…ôkaw…õ awut alar…ôm, MARIKI p…ôs…ĒŇč…õ afum aka k…ôl…Ē kam Ňčade Ňčayi p…ôm…Ē awut aka k…ôl…Ē ka Per…õs, aŇč…õ Tamar …õnakom…õ Yuda m…Ē!¬Ľ

4.14: K…Ē aran Ňčaloku Noyemi: ¬ęS…ôŇčkor-koru MARIKI! ∆Üs…ĒŇč…õ m…Ēk…Ē k'aŇčkom fum nw…õ endek…õk…ôs …ôm m…Ē. Kanu k…ôde k…ôpoc…õ wans…Ē kam p…ôdeb…õk tewe Yisrayel.

4.19: H…õc…ôron okom Ram, Ram okom Aminadab,

1.1: K…ôb…ônda ka dokom da Yesu Krist k…Ē kaŇčk…õ, wans…Ē ka Dawuda, wans…Ē ka Abraham:

1.6: k…Ē Yisay oŇčkom Dawuda w…ôb…õ w…ôka Yisrayel. Dawuda …õnanas…ôr w…ôran ka Uri, k…Ē ŇčaŇčkom Sulemani.

1.20: Isifu eyi ti k…ôc…õm-c…õmn…õ, gb…ôncana bab…Ēk…Ē k…Ē m…õl…õk…õ ma Mariki mowur…ôr k…Ē d…ômere, k…Ē moloku k…Ē: ¬ęIsifu wan ka Dawuda, ta m…ônes…õ k…ôl…õk Mari m…ôn…õnc…õ k…Ē, bawo wan nw…õ …õmb…õk…ôs m…Ē, baf…Ē d…ôfum …õy…õf…õ, mba d…ôAmera Ňäecempi.
1.21: W…ôran kam Mari endekom wan w…ôrkun m…ônde m…ôwe k…Ē Yesu , bawo nk…Ēn endeyac afum …Ēn kiciya k…ôŇčan.¬Ľ

1.23: ¬ęM…ôc…ôŇčk…ôl, w…ôyec…ôra w…ôt…Ēc…ôr…õ w…ôrkun endeb…õk…ôs. P…ôkom wan w…ôrkun nw…õ andewe Emaniyel m…Ē.¬Ľ It…Ē tat…Ēk…Ē: ¬ęKanu k…ôyi k…Ē s…ôna.¬Ľ

2.1: K'aŇčkom Yesu dare da Betl…õh…õm nde at…Ēf Ňča Yude, t…õm tat…Ēk…Ē t…Ē Herodu …õnay…Ēn…õ di w…ôb…õ. K…Ē ac…ôr…õ mes aka ntende k…ôca nk…õ dec d…õmp…õ m…Ē Ňčander Yerusal…õm,
2.2: k…Ē Ňčayif: ¬ęDeke k…ônaka nk…õ k…ôndey…Ēn…õ w…ôb…õ k'aSuyif nw…õ ant…õp k…ôckom m…Ē, eyi-…õ? Bawo s…ôn…ôŇčk k…Ēs k…Ēn ntende dec d…õmp…õ m…Ē, s…ônder k…ôdetontn…õn…õ k…Ē f…Ēr kiriŇč.¬Ľ

2.6: K…Ē m…ôna Betl…õh…õm at…Ēf Ňča Yuda, m…ôy…Ē d…ôk…ôc…ôm…õ s…ôdare s…ôp…ĒŇč sa Yuda dac…Ē, bawo dare dam d…Ē w…ôkiriŇč endewur nw…õ endek…õk…ôs afum em aŇč…õ Ňčay…Ēn…õ aka Yisrayel m…Ē.¬Ľ

K…Ē Ňčawe aboc kiti alp…ôs aSuyif k…Ē abeki ap…ĒŇč aka Yisrayel f…ôp, k…Ē Ňčasom a pak…Ē pawur…õn…õ asom a Yesu d…ôbili, pak…õr…õ.

7.2: K…Ē Etiy…õn oloku: ¬ęAw…õnc im aŇča, Papa kem aŇča, N…ôc…ôŇčk…ôl im! Kanu nk…õ debeki d…Ēn doŇčmot m…Ē k…ônawur…ôr Abraham, w…ôtem kosu, nt…õ …õnayi Mesopotami, ta …õntadeder k…ônd…õ HaraŇč m…Ē.

7.4: K…Ē Abraham owur at…Ēf Ňča Kaldi, k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ônd…õ dare da HaraŇč. D…ôndo, nt…õ defi da kas dencep…ôr m…Ē, k…Ē Kanu k…ôncep…ôr…õn…õ k…Ē at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ n…ônd…õ oŇč nd…õk…ôl m…Ē.
7.5: Kanu k…ônas…ĒŇč f…õ Abraham k…õ at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…õ, ali d…ôk…ôc…ômb…ôr k…ôc…ôk, mba k…ônal…õk…õ k…Ē temer k…ôdes…ĒŇč k…Ē Ňči k…ôb…ôp k…ôb…ônda ka dokom d…Ēn k…Ē nk…Ēn encep…ôr-…õ, mba t…õm tat…Ēk…Ē ta …õntay…Ē wan-…õ.
7.6: K…Ē Kanu k…ôloku Abraham nt…õ: ¬ęK…ôb…ônda ka dokom dam k…ôndeyi decik…ôra at…Ēf Ňč…Ēl…Ēma. Andek…Ēc…ômb…ôr Ňča di dacar, pat…Ēr…ôs Ňča meren masar maŇčk…ôl…õ (400).
7.7: Mba afum aka at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…Ēk…Ē Ňčandek…Ēc…ômb…ôr Ňča dacar m…Ē, in'endek…Ēboc…ôr Ňča kiti. K…Ē tencep…ôr-…õ, Ňčandewur Ňčadekor-kor im nn…Ē k…ôfo kaŇčk…õ.¬Ľ
7.8: Nt…õ tat…Ēk…Ē tencep…ôr m…Ē, k…Ē Kanu k…ôncaŇč…ôs kiyi k…Ēn tetin k…Ē Abraham, ti t…Ēy…Ēn…õ k…ôm…õŇčk…ôrn…õ ka k…ôk…ônc arkun. Ti disr…õ k…Ē Abraham oŇčkom Siyaka, k'…õŇčk…ônc k…Ē tataka t…Ēn ta cam…ôt-maas. It…Ē Siyaka …õnay…Ē s…Ē Yakuba, k…Ē Yakuba …Ēy…Ē s…Ē ti awut …Ēn arkun w…ôco k…Ē m…õr…ôŇč, aŇč…õ Ňčay…Ēn…õ cas ca cusuŇčka w…ôco k…Ē m…õr…ôŇč ca Yisrayel m…Ē.
7.9: Nt…õ atem asu, awut a Siyaka, Ňčanay…Ēn…õ w…õnc k…ôŇčan Isifu k…ôraca m…Ē, k…Ē Ňčancam…ôs k…Ē nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ pakek…ôr…õ k…Ē Misira m…Ē. Mba Kanu k…ônayi k…Ē Isifu,
7.10: k…ônayac k…Ē p…ôcuca f…ôp. Kanu k…ôncmar Isifu, k…ôcs…ĒŇč k…Ē k…ôc…ôr…õ k…ôk…Ēt nde Firawona w…ôb…õ ka Misira f…Ēr kiriŇč. Firawona …õnas…ĒŇč Isifu dekiriŇč da Misira k…Ē da k…ôl…Ē k…Ēn disr…õ f…ôp m…Ē.
7.11: K…Ē dor d…Ēp…ĒŇč dende deyi Misira f…ôp k…Ē at…Ēf Ňča KanaŇč. P…ôcuca p…õnab…õk, atem asu Ňčancs…Ēt…Ē f…õ yeri.
7.12: K…Ē Yakuba ende p…ône a c…ôgbay c…ôyi Misira, k'osom t…Ēc…Ēk…Ē-c…Ēk…Ē awut …Ēn aŇč…õ Ňčant…ôŇčn…õ atem asu m…Ē.
7.13: Tam…õr…ôŇč, k…Ē Isifu owur…ôrn…õ aw…õnc …Ēn, nt…õ t…Ē k…Ē Firawona …Ēs…Ēt…Ē k…ôc…ôr…õ oŇč akom…õn…õ a Isifu.
7.14: K…Ē Isifu osom aw…õnc …Ēn a pak…õr…õ k…Ē kas Yakuba, k…ôl…õk…õn…õ ka afum …Ēn f…ôp, aŇč…õ Ňčancb…ôp afum w…ôco cam…ôt-m…õr…ôŇč k…Ē k…ôcam…ôt (75) m…Ē.
7.15: K…Ē Yakuba ontor at…Ēf Ňča Misira. Dif…Ē …õnafi, k…Ē atem asu al…Ēma.
7.16: K'aŇčkek…ôr…õ c…ôbel c…ôŇčan S…ôk…õm, k'aŇčk…Ē pawup nde kufu nk…õ Abraham …õnaway…õ p…ôsam nn…Ē kusuŇčka ka Ham…Ēr k…ôyi m…Ē.
7.17: T…õm nt…õ p…ônamar a Kanu k…ôlas temer nt…õ k…ônal…õk…õ Abraham m…Ē t…õnal…Ēt…ôrn…õ. K…Ē dokomb…ôra d…õmb…õk, k…Ē afum ŇčaŇčla oŇč k…ôla d…ôm Misira,
7.18: haŇč k…Ē w…ôb…õ w…ôl…Ēma ender p…ônd…õ d…õb…õ da at…Ēf ŇčaŇč…Ēk…Ē nw…õ …õnat…Ēc…ôr…õ Isifu m…Ē.
7.19: W…ôb…õ w…ôkak…Ē ender p…ôcn…õmp…ôs, p…ôct…Ēr…ôs atem asu. K'ende p…ôs…ĒŇč…õ Ňča k…ôsak c…ônaka c…ôŇčan, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ ta akak…Ē Ňčantam k…ôyi doru m…Ē.
7.20: T…õm tat…Ēk…Ē t'anakom Musa, nw…õ …õnab…Ēt Kanu k…ôn…ôŇčk m…Ē. K'ant…Ēmp…ôr k…Ē yof maas nde k…ôl…Ē ka kas disr…õ,
7.21: mba nt…õ t…Ēy…Ē t…õnat…Ēyi m…õn…õ k…ôgbal k…Ēn m…Ē, k…Ē wan ka w…ôb…õ ka Misira w…ôran efir k…Ē, k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôdusum p…ôy…Ē k…Ē wan.
7.22: K…ôc…ôr…õ k…ôk…Ēt f…ôp k'aMisira k'anadusum…õ Musa, k'…Ēs…Ēt…Ē f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr d…ômoloku k…Ē d…ôm…Ēy…Ē.
7.23: Nt…õ Musa …Ēs…Ēt…Ē meren w…ôco maŇčk…ôl…õ (40) m…Ē, k'ende p…ôc…õm-c…õmn…õ k…ôk…Ēn…ôŇčk aw…õnc aŇča, afum a Yisrayel.
7.24: K…Ē Musa …ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôt…ôŇčn…õ w…õnc w…ôkin w…ôka Misira paccak…ôra, k'…õnc…ôm…õn…õ w…õnc w…ôkak…Ē anct…Ēr…ôs m…Ē. K'oluks…õ ay…õk Ňča w…õnc, k'endif w…ôMisira.
7.25: K…Ē Musa …õnc…õm-c…õmn…õ a aw…õnc aŇča ŇčaŇčtam k…ôcgb…õk…ôr…õ a Kanu k…ôntam k…ôbaŇč Ňča k…Ē Ňčanc…ôm…õ k…Ē dar…ôŇč-…õ, mba Ňčanac…ôr…õ f…õ ti.
7.26: D…Ēck…Ēs…Ēk, k…Ē Musa …ĒŇčk…Ē p…ôb…ôp aYisrayel m…õr…ôŇč Ňčacsut…õn…õ, k'…õyac Ňča, k'olomp…ôs Ňča dac…Ē. K'eyif Ňča: ‚ÄĻTa ake t…Ē n…ôŇčsutn…õn…õ tant…õ-…õ? D…õw…õnca d…Ē n…ôy…Ē!‚Äļ
7.27: Mba w…ôk…Ē …õnccak…ôra w…õnc m…Ē, …õw…õn Musa p…ôcyif: ‚ÄĻAn'…Ēs…ĒŇč …ôm k…ôy…Ēn…õ w…ôb…õ k…Ē w…ôboc kiti s…ôna dac…Ē-…õ?
7.28: K…ôdif im k…Ē m…ôfaŇč ba, p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē m…ôndifsa w…ôMisira m…Ē?‚Äļ
7.29: K…Ē moloku mam…Ēk…Ē m…Ēs…ĒŇč…õ Musa k…ôy…õks…õ, k'…ĒŇčk…Ē p…ônd…õ decik…ôra at…Ēf Ňča MadiyaŇč. Dif…Ē …õnakom awut arkun m…õr…ôŇč.
7.30: Nt…õ meren w…ôco maŇčk…ôl…õ mencep…ôr (40) m…Ē, k…Ē m…õl…õk…õ mowur…ôr Musa nde t…õgb…ôr…õ ta t…Ēr…Ē ta Turisnina d…ômemer ma n…õnc nd…õ d…õncmar d…õr…ônt…ôm m…Ē.
7.31: Nt…õ Musa …õn…ôŇčk ti m…Ē, k…Ē p…ônciyan…õ k…Ē k…ôn…ôŇčk ka tes t…õw…õy-w…õy tat…Ēk…Ē, nt…õ …Ēncc…ĒŇčn…õ k…ôk…Ēgb…õk…ôr…õ m…Ē, k…Ē dim da W…ôb…õ Kanu dender k…Ē:
7.32: ‚ÄĻIn'…Ēf…Ē, Kanu ka atem am: Kanu ka Abraham, ka Siyaka k…Ē ka Yakuba!‚Äļ Musa p…ôcyikc…õ, ta oŇčwos…õ s…Ē k…ôgb…ôtn…õ di-…õ.
7.33: K…Ē W…ôb…õ oloku k…Ē: ‚ÄĻM…ôwur…õ c…Ēfta cam d…ôw…õc…ôk, bawo k…ôfo kaŇčk…Ē m…ônc…ôm…õ m…Ē, k…ôfo k…ôcempi k…Ē.
7.34: In…ôŇčk p…ôcuy pa afum em aŇč…õ Ňčayi Misira m…Ē, ine kigbis k…ôŇčan: K…ôtor k'inder ideyac Ňča. Nd…õk…ôl oŇč, m…ôder isom …ôm Misira.‚Äļ
7.35: Musa w…ôkak…Ē Ňčanace a Ňčacloku: ¬ęAn'…Ēs…ĒŇč …ôm k…ôy…Ēn…õ w…ôb…õ k…Ē w…ôboc kiti s…ôna dac…Ē-…õ?¬Ľ Nk…Ēn Kanu k…ônasom p…ôy…Ēn…õ w…ôb…õ k…Ē w…ôyac, k…ôb…õr…õn…õ ka m…õl…õk…õ mm…õ m…õnawur…ôr k…Ē nde d…õr…ônt…ôm m…Ē.
7.36: Nk…Ēn Musa …õnawur…õn…õ aYisrayel Misira p…ôcy…Ē mes m…õw…õy-w…õy k…Ē m…õgb…õk…ôr…õ ma Kanu, nde k…ôba K…ôyim k…Ē nde d…ôt…õgb…ôr…õ, meren mm…õ w…ôco maŇčk…ôl…õ (40) disr…õ.
7.37: Nk…Ēn Musa w…ôkak…Ē yati …õnaloku aYisrayel: ‚ÄĻKanu k…ôndek…õr…õ nu sayib…õ p…ôm…Ē ina, nw…õ k…ôndey…õk-y…õk aw…õnc anu dac…Ē m…Ē, p…ôsom k…Ē nn…Ē n…ôyi m…Ē.‚Äļ
7.38: Nk…Ēn Musa, nt…õ afum ŇčanaloŇčkan…õ nde d…ôt…õgb…ôr…õ m…Ē, nk…Ēn …õnay…Ēn…õ s…Ē w…ôcep…ôr…õn…õ moloku atem asu dac…Ē k…Ē m…õl…õk…õ mm…õ monclok-lok…ôr k…Ē nde d…ôt…Ēr…Ē ta Turisnina m…Ē. K'…Ēs…Ēt…Ē moloku meyi w…ôyeŇč, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ s…ôc…ôr…õ mi m…Ē.
7.39: Atem asu ŇčanafaŇč f…õ k…ôc…ôŇčk…ôl k…Ē, k…Ē Ňčaw…õn…ôs k…Ē. Ňäanac…õm-c…õmn…õ d…ôb…ôk…ôc k…ôluks…ôrn…õ Misira.
7.40: K…Ē atem asu Ňčaloku Aruna, ‚ÄĻM…ôlomp…ôs…õ su m…õr…ôŇčka, mm…õ mendesol…õ su m…Ē, bawo Musa nw…õ owur…õn…õ su Misira m…Ē, s…ônc…ôr…õ f…õ nt…õ t…Ēs…Ēt…Ē k…Ē m…Ē.‚Äļ
7.41: Mata mam…Ēk…Ē, k…Ē Ňčalomp…ôs t…õr…ôŇčka ta tura, k…Ē ŇčaloŇčn…õ nn…Ē t…õr…ôŇčka kiriŇč, k…Ē Ňčamboc…õ k…ôsata y…õb…ôc ya waca waŇčan.
7.42: Mba k…Ē Kanu k…ômb…õr Ňča kumunt, k…Ē k…ôsak…õ Ňča k…ôkor-koru ca ya darenc. It'ancic ti buk ba sayib…õ disr…õ: ‚ÄĻN…ôna aka Yisrayel, meren w…ôco maŇčk…ôl…õ (40) mm…õ n…ôncep…ôr…õn…õ d…ôt…õgb…ôr…õ m…Ē, in'…Ē n…ôncdif…õ s…õm k…ôloŇčn…õ disr…õ ba?
7.43: N…ônakek…ôr…õ abal Ňča t…õr…ôŇčka ta M…Ēl…Ēk k…Ē t…õr…ôŇčka ta k…Ēs ka kanu konu RefaŇč. N…ônapat m…õr…ôŇčka teta k…ôctontn…õn…õ ka mi f…Ēr kiriŇč! Ti disr…õ k…ôkek…ôr…õ nu k'inder decik…ôra Babil…ĒŇč tadar…ôŇč.‚Äļ
7.44: Atem asu Ňčanay…Ē d…ôndo d…ôt…õgb…ôr…õ aŇčgbancan Ňča sede nŇč…õ anam…õŇčk walak…õ wa masar nw…õ Kanu k…ônacic…õ Musa m…Ē. Tat…Ēk…Ē t…Ē w…ôlok-lok…ôr ka Musa …õnaloku k…Ē a p…ôy…Ē, a Ňčowur…õn…õ k…Ē Ňč…Ēk…Ē …õnan…ôŇčk m…Ē.
7.45: Nt…õ atem asu Ňčas…Ēt…Ē Ňči m…Ē, k…Ē ŇčaŇčkek…ôr…õ nde at…Ēf nŇč…õ Kanu k…ônab…õl…ôs afum f…Ēr yaŇčan kiriŇč m…Ē. Yosuwe p…ôy…Ēn…õ Ňča w…ôkiriŇč. AŇčgbancan ŇčaŇč…Ēk…Ē Ňč…õnayi di haŇč t…õm ta Dawuda.
7.46: K…Ē Dawuda …Ēs…Ēt…Ē k…ômar ka Kanu, k'ontola s…Ē k…ôs…ĒŇč k…Ē k…ôfo nk…õ …ĒŇčk…Ēc…ômb…ôr…õ Kanu ka Yakuba d…ôk…ôyi m…Ē.
7.48: M…õn…õ nt…õ W…ôb…õ w…ôka darenc …Ēnt…Ēwos…õ k…ôyi paka disr…õ mp…õ k…ôca ka fum k…ôlomp…ôs m…Ē, p…ôm…Ē t…Ēk…Ē sayib…õ s…ôloku ti m…Ē:
7.49: ‚ÄĻW…ôb…õ oloku: ¬ęK…Ēm k…ôy…Ēn…õ d…Ēc…Ēm dem da d…õb…õ, k…Ē ant…Ēf Ňč…Ēy…Ēn…õ d…ôk…ôc…ômb…ôr dem w…õc…ôk. Ake k…ôl…Ē k…Ē n…ôyi k…ôc…ômb…ôr em-…õ? K…ôfo k…ôre k'inde icŇčes…ôm-…õ?
7.50: Baf…Ē k…ôca kem k…ôlomp…ôs mam…õ f…ôp ba?¬Ľ‚Äļ
7.51: N…ôna afum ataŇči l…ôŇč…ôs, ay…Ē b…ôk…ôc p…ôm…Ē bilakoro! HaŇč m…Ēk…Ē n…ôna n…ôyi k…ôw…õn…ôs Amera Ňäecempi Ňča Kanu p…ôm…Ē atem anu!
7.52: Sayib…õ s…ôre atem anu Ňčanat…Ēt…Ēr…ôs-…õ? Ňäanadif aŇč…õ ŇčananuŇčk…õn…õ k…ôd…ôŇčk k…ôder ka W…ôlompu nw…õ n…ôna n…ônas…ĒŇč oŇč a k…Ē andif m…Ē.
7.53: N…ôna aŇč…õ n…ônas…Ēt…Ē sariy…õ sa Musa ns…õ m…õl…õk…õ ma Kanu m…õnaloku k…Ē m…Ē, mba n…ônak…Ēt…õn…õ f…õ si, n…ôm…õŇčk…ôrn…õ f…õ s…Ē si.¬Ľ K…ôdif ka Etiy…õn
7.54: Nt…õ Etiy…õn onclok-loku m…Ē, afum ak…Ē Ňčancne moloku mam…Ēk…Ē m…Ē, p…ônanaŇčkan…õ k…ôt…õl…õ Ňča haŇč ŇčancŇčaŇč…ôr…õn…õ sek nn…Ē eyi m…Ē.
7.55: Mba Amera Ňäecempi Ňča Kanu Ňč…õncb…ôc Etiy…õn d…ôris. K'…õŇčgb…ôtn…õ k…Ēm, k'…õn…ôŇčk n…Ēr…Ē da debeki da Kanu, Yesu p…ôc…ôm…õ Kanu k…ôs…ôk.
7.56: K'oloku: ¬ęIn…ôŇčk k…Ēm k…ôgbit…õ, Wan ka W…ôrkun p…ôc…ôm…õ Kanu k…ôs…ôk!¬Ľ
7.57: K…Ē afum aŇč…õ ŇčaŇčkul…õ-kul…õ p…ôp…ĒŇč, k…Ē Ňčasuncn…õ l…ôŇč…ôs, k…Ē Ňčaw…õtn…õ f…ôp faŇčan k…ôk…Ēb…ôp Etiy…õn.
7.58: K…Ē Ňčamb…õl…ôs k…Ē haŇč k…Ē Ňčawur…õn…õ k…Ē dare, k…Ē Ňčanca-cas k…Ē masar. At…ôŇčn…õ aka ti Ňčanaboc suma saŇčan sa k…ôroŇč w…ôt…õmp d…ônt…Ēf, nw…õ ancwe Sol m…Ē.
7.59: Nt…õ Ňčancca-cas k…Ē m…Ē, k…Ē Etiy…õn ontola p…ôcloku: ¬ęMariki Yesu, m…ôbaŇč amera Ňčem.¬Ľ
7.60: Nt…õ t…Ē k…Ē Etiy…õn …õnc…ôp suwu, k'oŇčkul…õ-kul…õ: ¬ęW…ôb…õ, ta m…ôsars…ôr Ňča kiciya kaŇčk…õ!¬Ľ Nt…õ elip k…ôloku tat…Ēk…Ē m…Ē, k'eŇčgbiŇč kifir.

8.1: Sol …õnawos…õ k…ôdif ka Etiy…õn. Sol …Ēnct…Ēr…ôs k…ôloŇčkan…õ ka alaŇč Yesu D…Ēs…Ēk dad…Ēk…Ē d'anacop k…ôt…Ēr…ôs k…ôloŇčkan…õ ka alaŇč Yesu d…ôndo Yerusal…õm. K…Ē alaŇč f…ôp faŇčan Ňčasam…ôs…ôr nde t…Ēf ya Yude k…Ē Samari, m…õn…õ asom a Yesu.
8.2: K…Ē afum alompu al…Ēma Ňčawup Etiy…õn, k…Ē Ňčambok k…Ē belbel.
8.3: K…Ē Sol nk…Ēn …õy…õf…õ k…ôt…Ēr…ôs ka k…ôloŇčkan…õ ka alaŇč Yesu, p…ôcb…õr…õ d…ôw…Ēl…Ē waŇčan, p…ôcwur…õn…õ Ňča, p…ôcsump…ôr arkun k…Ē aran, p…ôcb…õr Ňča d…ôbili. Filip k…ôcam k…Ēn moloku m…Ēt…Ēt at…Ēf Ňča Samari
8.4: AlaŇč aŇč…õ Ňčanasam…ôs…ôr m…Ē, Ňčanccam moloku m…Ēt…Ēt mofo f…ôp mm…õ Ňčanccep…ôr m…Ē.
8.5: Filip nw…õ …õnator dare da Samari m…Ē, …õnccam teta Krist, nw…õ Kanu k…ôy…õk-y…õk k…ôy…Ēn…õ W…ôb…õ m…Ē.
8.6: K…ônay k'afum k…ôt…ôŇčn…õ disr…õ Ňčancc…ôŇčk…ôl belbel t…Ēk…Ē Filip oncloku m…Ē, nt…õ Ňčancne k…Ē Ňčacn…ôŇčk s…Ē m…õgb…õk…ôr…õ ma Kanu mm…õ …Ēncy…Ē m…Ē.
8.7: Y…ĒŇčk y…õl…õc yonckul…õ-kul…õ k…ôwur afum alar…ôm d…ôris aka dare dad…Ēk…Ē. Anatam…ôs ator…ôr k…Ē afum alar…ôm ak…Ē Ňčanafi w…õc…ôk m…Ē.
8.8: K…Ē p…ôbotu p…Ēp…ĒŇč p…õmb…õr…õ dare da Samari.
8.9: W…ôrkun w…ôl…Ēma …õnayi di pacwe k…Ē Sim…ĒŇč. ∆źnawon dare dad…Ēk…Ē, p…ôy…Ēn…õ dure, p…ôcs…ĒŇč…õ aka Samari cusu k…ôwos, p…ôcwen…õ s…Ē fum w…ôp…ĒŇč.
8.10: Afum f…ôp k…ôy…õf…õ wanf…õt haŇč w…ôbeki Ňčanalel…ôs k…Ē, Ňčacloku: ¬ęFum w…ôkaw…õ …Ēy…Ēn…õ f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr fa Kanu, f…ôn…Ēnt…ôr f…ôk…Ē aŇčwe ‚ÄĻF…ôp…ĒŇč‚Äļ m…Ē.¬Ľ

Mba d…ôm…õd…õr…ôm monu p…ômar m…ôloku: ‚ÄĻ∆źy‚Äļ k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ kance k…Ē-…õ, m…ôloku: ‚ÄĻAla‚Äļ k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ a baf…Ē kance k…Ē-…õ, nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ ta n…ônt…õmp…õn…õ kiti d…ônt…Ēf m…Ē.

3.1: N…ôm…Ēm…ôn ma k…ôb…Ēt…ôr k…ôp…ĒŇč nk…õ Papa Kanu …Ēs…ĒŇč su m…Ē, k…ôb…Ēt…ôr kaŇčk…Ē k…ôs…ĒŇč…õ pacwe su ¬ęawut a Kanu.¬Ľ Ňäa Ňč…Ē s…ôy…Ēn…õ yati! K'afum a doru Ňčant…Ēc…ôr…õ su-…õ, t…Ēy…Ēn…õ a Ňčanc…ôr…õ f…õ Kanu.

4.1: N…ôna aŇč…õ imb…Ēt…ôr m…Ē, ta n…ôlaŇč ak…Ē ŇčabaŇč…õn…õ k…ôy…Ē Amera m…Ē f…ôp. Mba n…ôk…Ēkc…õ yi nt…õ t…ĒŇčs…ĒŇč…õ n…ôtam k…ôc…ôr…õ k…Ē p…ôy…Ēn…õ ya d…ôKanu y…Ē-…õ, bawo sayib…õ sa yem s…ôlar…ôm s…ôsams…ôr doru.

4.5: Ňäa, aka doru Ňč…Ē. Ti t…Ēs…ĒŇč…õ nt…õ moloku maŇčan m…Ēy…Ēn…õ ma doru m…Ē, k…Ē doru d…õnc…ôŇčk…ôl Ňča.

4.12: Ali katin fum o fum …õŇčgb…ôtn…õ f…õ Kanu. K…Ē s…ômb…Ēt…ôr…õn…õ-…õ, Kanu k…ôŇčyi su dac…Ē, k…ôb…Ēt…ôr k…Ēn k…ôf…Ēbut su.
